arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ هَارُونَ، قَالَ: أَنْبَأَنَا النَّضْرُ بْنُ زُرَارَةَ، عَنْ أَبِي جَنَابٍ، عَنْ إِيَادِ بْنِ لَقِيطٍ، عَنِ الْجَهْدَمَةِ، امْرَأَةِ بِشْرِ ابْنِ الْخَصَاصِيَّةِ، قَالَتْ: أَنَا رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ يَخْرُجُ مِنْ بَيْتِهِ يَنْفُضُ رَأْسَهُ وَقَدِ اغْتَسَلَ، وَبِرَأْسِهِ رَدْعٌ مِنْ حِنَّاءٍ أَوْ قَالَ: رَدْغٌ شَكَّ فِي هَذَا الشَّيْخُ.
references: Book of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Using a Dye, Hadith 46

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 47
englishRaw: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says: "I saw that the hair of Messenger of Allah ﷺ had been dyed."
body: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says: "I saw that the hair of Messenger of Allah ﷺ had been dyed."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَاصِمٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا حُمَيْدٌ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ، قَالَ: رَأَيْتُ شَعَرَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ مَخْضُوبًا.
references: Book of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Using a Dye, Hadith 47

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 48
englishRaw:
Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Use kuhl made of ithmid on the eye; it brightens the eyesight, and strengthens and increases the growth of the eye lashes'. (Sayyidina Ibn'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) also used to say) 'Messenger of Allah Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallarn had a small container for keeping kuhl, from which he applied kuhl in each eye three times every night"'
narrator: Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Use kuhl made of ithmid on the eye; it brightens the eyesight, and strengthens and increases the growth of the eye lashes'. (Sayyidina Ibn'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) also used to say) 'Messenger of Allah Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallarn had a small container for keeping kuhl, from which he applied kuhl in each eye three times every night"'
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ الرَّازِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو دَاوُدَ الطَّيَالِسِيُّ، عَنْ عَبَّادِ بْنِ مَنْصُورٍ، عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، قَالَ: اكْتَحِلُوا بِالإِثْمِدِ، فَإِنَّهُ يَجْلُو الْبَصَرَ، وَيُنْبِتُ الشَّعْرَ وَزَعَمَ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، كَانَتْ لَهُ مُكْحُلَةٌ يَكْتَحِلُ مِنْهَا كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ، ثَلاثَةً فِي هَذِهِ، وَثَلاثَةً فِي هَذِهِ.
references: Book of Kuhl Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 48

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 49
englishRaw:
Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ applied kuhl of ithmid three times in each eye before sleeping'. In a narration also from Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him), it is reported: "Rasuluilah ﷺ had a small container for keeping kuhl, from which he applied in each eye kuhl three times before sleeping'.
narrator: Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ applied kuhl of ithmid three times in each eye before sleeping'. In a narration also from Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him), it is reported: "Rasuluilah ﷺ had a small container for keeping kuhl, from which he applied in each eye kuhl three times before sleeping'.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ الصَّبَّاحِ الْهَاشِمِيُّ الْبَصْرِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ مُوسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْرَائِيلُ، عَنْ عَبَّادِ بْنِ مَنْصُورٍ (ح) وَحَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبَّادُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ، عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ: كَانَّ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يَكْتَحِلُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَنَامَ بِالإِثْمِدِ، ثَلاثًا فِي كُلِّ عَيْنٍ، وَقَالَ يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ، فِي حَدِيثِهِ: إِنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، كَانَتْ لَهُ مُكْحُلَةٌ يَكْتَحِلُ مِنْهَا عِنْدَ النَّوْمِ، ثَلاثًا فِي كُلِّ عَيْنٍ.
references: Book of Kuhl Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 49

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 50
englishRaw:
Jaabir bin 'Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Use the kuhl made from ithmid for the eyes. It brightens the vision and strengthens the growth of the eye lashes'.
narrator: Jaabir bin 'Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Use the kuhl made from ithmid for the eyes. It brightens the vision and strengthens the growth of the eye lashes'.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَنِيعٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ، عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ، عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْمُنْكَدِرِ، عَنْ جَابِرٍ هُوَ ابْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: عَلَيْكُمْ بِالإِثْمِدِ عِنْدَ النَّوْمِ، فَإِنَّهُ يَجْلُو الْبَصَرَ، وَيُنْبِتُ الشَّعْرَ.
references: Book of Kuhl Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 50

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 51
englishRaw:
Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah Sallallah 'Alayhi Wasallam has said: 'The best from among all the kuhl used by you is the one made from ithmid. It brightens the eyesight and strengthens the growth of the eye lashes"'
narrator: Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah Sallallah 'Alayhi Wasallam has said: 'The best from among all the kuhl used by you is the one made from ithmid. It brightens the eyesight and strengthens the growth of the eye lashes"'
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ الْمُفَضَّلِ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ خُثَيْمٍ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: إِنَّ خَيْرَ أَكْحَالِكُمُ الإِثْمِدُ، يَجْلُو الْبَصَرَ، وَيُنْبِتُ الشَّعْرَ.
references: Book of Kuhl Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 51

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 52
englishRaw:
'Abdullah bin 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) related the same hadith from Messenger of Allah Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallarn that:
                      "Verily use the kuhl made from ithmid. It brightens the vision and strengthens the growth of the eye lashes".
narrator: 'Abdullah bin 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) related the same hadith from Messenger of Allah Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallarn that:
body: "Verily use the kuhl made from ithmid. It brightens the vision and strengthens the growth of the eye lashes".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْمُسْتَمِرِّ الْبَصْرِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَاصِمٍ، عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ، عَنْ سَالِمٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: عَلَيْكُمْ بِالإِثْمِدِ، فَإِنَّهُ يَجْلُو الْبَصَرَ، وَيُنْبِتُ الشَّعْرَ.
references: Book of Kuhl Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 52

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 53
englishRaw:
Ummul Mu-mineen, Ummi Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) relates:
                      "Of all the clothing, Messenger of Allah ﷺ preferred wearing the qamis (Thowb, kurtaa) the most"
narrator: Ummul Mu-mineen, Ummi Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) relates:
body: "Of all the clothing, Messenger of Allah ﷺ preferred wearing the qamis (Thowb, kurtaa) the most"
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ الرَّازِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الْفَضْلُ بْنُ مُوسَى، وَأَبُو تُمَيْلَةَ، وَزَيْدُ بْنُ حُبَابٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ الْمُؤْمِنِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ بُرَيْدَةَ، عَنْ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ، قَالَتْ: كَانَ أَحَبَّ الثِّيَابِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ الْقَمِيصُ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 53

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 54
englishRaw: Same as above hadith.
body: Same as above hadith.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الْفَضْلُ بْنُ مُوسَى، عَنْ عَبْدِ الْمُؤْمِنِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ بُرَيْدَةَ، عَنْ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ، قَالَتْ: كَانَ أَحَبَّ الثِّيَابِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ الْقَمِيصُ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 54

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 55
englishRaw:
It has been reported from Ummi Salamah Radhiyallahu 'Anha:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ preferred wearing, from among all clothing, the qamis (thowb)"
narrator: It has been reported from Ummi Salamah Radhiyallahu 'Anha:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ preferred wearing, from among all clothing, the qamis (thowb)"
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا زِيَادُ بْنُ أَيُّوبَ الْبَغْدَادِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو تُمَيْلَةَ، عَنْ عَبْدِ الْمُؤْمِنِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ بُرَيْدَةَ، عَنْ أَمِّهِ، عَنْ أُمِّ سَلَمَةَ، قَالَتْ: كَانَ أَحَبَّ الثِّيَابِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ يَلْبَسُهُ، الْقَمِيصُ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 55

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 56
englishRaw:
Asmaa bint Yazeed Radhiyallahu 'Anha says:
                      "The sleeve of Messenger of Allah ﷺ's qamis reached to the wrists"
narrator: Asmaa bint Yazeed Radhiyallahu 'Anha says:
body: "The sleeve of Messenger of Allah ﷺ's qamis reached to the wrists"
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحَجَّاجِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي، عَنْ بُدَيْلٍ يَعْنِي ابْنَ مَيْسَرَةَ الْعُقَيْلِيَّ، عَنْ شَهْرِ بْنِ حَوْشَبٍ، عَنْ أَسْمَاءَ بِنْتِ يَزِيدَ، قَالَتْ: كَانَ كُمُّ قَمِيصِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ إِلَى الرُّسْغِ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 56

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 57
englishRaw:
Qurrah bin Ilyaas (may Allah be pleased with him) relates:
                      "I came with a group from the tribe of Muzeenah to make bay'ah (pay allegiance) to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. The button loop of Messenger of Allah ﷺ's qamis was open. I put my hand in the collar of Messenger of Allah ﷺ's qamis to touch the Seal of Prophethood (to gain barakah)".
narrator: Qurrah bin Ilyaas (may Allah be pleased with him) relates:
body: "I came with a group from the tribe of Muzeenah to make bay'ah (pay allegiance) to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. The button loop of Messenger of Allah ﷺ's qamis was open. I put my hand in the collar of Messenger of Allah ﷺ's qamis to touch the Seal of Prophethood (to gain barakah)".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَمَّارٍ الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ حُرَيْثٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا زُهَيْرٌ، عَنْ عُرْوَةَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ قُشَيْرٍ، عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ قُرَّةَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، قَالَ: أَتَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ فِي رَهْطٍ مِنْ مُزَيْنَةَ لِنُبَايِعَهُ، وَإِنَّ قَمِيصَهُ لَمُطْلَقٌ، أَوْ قَالَ: زِرُّ قَمِيصِهِ مُطْلَقٌ قَالَ: فَأَدْخَلْتُ يَدِي فِي جَيْبِ قَمِيصِهِ، فَمَسَسْتُ الْخَاتَمَ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 57

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 58
englishRaw:
Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) reports:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out of his house with the assistance of Usaamah bin Zayd. At that time he was wrapped in a Yamaani printed sheet. Messenger of Allah ﷺ came and led the Sahaabah in prayer".
narrator: Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) reports:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out of his house with the assistance of Usaamah bin Zayd. At that time he was wrapped in a Yamaani printed sheet. Messenger of Allah ﷺ came and led the Sahaabah in prayer".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ، عَنْ حَبِيبِ بْنِ الشَّهِيدِ، عَنِ الْحَسَنِ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ خَرَجَ وَهُوَ يَتَّكِئُ عَلَى أُسَامَةَ بْنِ زَيْدٍ عَلَيْهِ ثَوْبٌ قِطْرِيٌّ، قَدْ تَوَشَّحَ بِهِ، فَصَلَّى بِهِمْ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 58

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 59
englishRaw:
Abu Sa'eed Khudari (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "When Messenger of Allah ﷺ put on a new garment, he would in happiness mention that garment's name. For example, 'Allah Ta'aala gave me this qamis (thowb, kurtah), 'amaamah (turban) sheet, etc" Then recited this du'aa:
                     'Allahumma lakal hamdu kama kasauw-tanihi, as-aluka khayrahu wa-khayra ma-suni'a lahu wa-a'u- dhu bika min sharrihi wa-sharri ma-suni'a lahu'.Translation..."Oh Allah, all praise and thanks to You for clothing me with this (garment). I ask You for the good of it and the good of what it was made for, and I ask Your protection from the evil of it and the evil of what it was made for."
narrator: Abu Sa'eed Khudari (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "When Messenger of Allah ﷺ put on a new garment, he would in happiness mention that garment's name. For example, 'Allah Ta'aala gave me this qamis (thowb, kurtah), 'amaamah (turban) sheet, etc" Then recited this du'aa:
body: 'Allahumma lakal hamdu kama kasauw-tanihi, as-aluka khayrahu wa-khayra ma-suni'a lahu wa-a'u- dhu bika min sharrihi wa-sharri ma-suni'a lahu'.Translation..."Oh Allah, all praise and thanks to You for clothing me with this (garment). I ask You for the good of it and the good of what it was made for, and I ask Your protection from the evil of it and the evil of what it was made for."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا سُوَيْدُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ إِيَاسٍ الْجُرَيْرِيِّ، عَنْ أَبِي نَضْرَةَ، عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيِّ، قَالَ: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، إِذَا اسْتَجَدَّ ثَوْبًا سَمَّاهُ بِاسْمِهِ عِمَامَةً أَوْ قَمِيصًا أَوْ رِدَاءً، ثُمَّ يَقُولُ: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ كَمَا كَسَوْتَنِيهِ، أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهُ وَخَيْرَ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَشَرِّ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 59

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 60
englishRaw:
Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "The sheet (body wrap) most liked by Messenger of Allah ﷺ was the Yamaani printed sheet."
narrator: Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "The sheet (body wrap) most liked by Messenger of Allah ﷺ was the Yamaani printed sheet."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ أَحَبَّ الثِّيَابِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، يَلْبَسُهُ الْحِبَرَةُ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 60

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 61
englishRaw:
Abu Juhayfah (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ wearing a pair of red (coloured) clothing. The lustre of the feet of Messenger of Allah ﷺ is still before me." Sufyaan (R.A) who is a narrator of this hadith says:
                      "According to my understanding the pair (of clothing) was printed red."
narrator: Abu Juhayfah (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ wearing a pair of red (coloured) clothing. The lustre of the feet of Messenger of Allah ﷺ is still before me." Sufyaan (R.A) who is a narrator of this hadith says:
body: "According to my understanding the pair (of clothing) was printed red."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنْ عَوْنِ بْنِ أَبِي جُحَيْفَةَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، قَالَ: رَأَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، وَعَلَيْهِ حُلَّةٌ حَمْرَاءُ، كَأَنِّي أَنْظُرُ إِلَى بَرِيقِ سَاقَيْهِ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 61

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 62
englishRaw:
Baraa bin 'Aazib (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "I have never seen anybody more handsome in red clothing than Messenger of Allah ﷺ. At that time, the hair of Messenger of Allah ﷺ reached his shoulders
narrator: Baraa bin 'Aazib (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "I have never seen anybody more handsome in red clothing than Messenger of Allah ﷺ. At that time, the hair of Messenger of Allah ﷺ reached his shoulders
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ خَشْرَمٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ، عَنْ إِسْرَائِيلَ، عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، عَنِ الْبَرَاءِ بْنِ عَازِبٍ، قَالَ: مَا رَأَيْتُ أَحَدًا مِنَ النَّاسِ أَحْسَنَ فِي حُلَّةٍ حَمْرَاءَ، مِنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، إِنْ كَانَتْ جُمَّتُهُ لَتَضْرِبُ قَرِيبًا مِنْ مَنْكِبَيْهِ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 62

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 63
englishRaw: Abu Rimthah Taymi (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ covering himself in two green coloured sheets."
body: Abu Rimthah Taymi (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ covering himself in two green coloured sheets."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مَهْدِيٍّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ إِيَادٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ أَبِي رِمْثَةَ، قَالَ: رَأَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، وَعَلَيْهِ بُرْدَانِ أَخْضَرَانِ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 63

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 64
englishRaw:
Qaylah bint Makhramah (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
                      "I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ in such a state that he was wearing two old lungis (sarong, waist wrap) that had been dyed a saffron colour but there was no sign of saffron left on it." There is a lengthy story in this hadith also
narrator: Qaylah bint Makhramah (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
body: "I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ in such a state that he was wearing two old lungis (sarong, waist wrap) that had been dyed a saffron colour but there was no sign of saffron left on it." There is a lengthy story in this hadith also
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَفَّانُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ حَسَّانَ الْعَنْبَرِيُّ، عَنْ جَدَّتَيْهِ دُحَيْبَةَ، وَعُلَيْبَةَ، عَنْ قَيْلَةَ بِنْتِ مَخْرَمَةَ، قَالَتْ: رَأَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ وَعَلَيْهِ أَسْمَالُ مُلَيَّتَيْنِ، كَانَتَا بِزَعْفَرَانٍ، وَقَدْ نَفَضَتْهُ وَفِي الْحَدِيثِ قِصَّةٌ طَوِيلَةٌ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 64

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 65
englishRaw:
Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) says that Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say:
                      "Choose white clothing, as it is the best clothing. White clothing should be worn whilst living, and the dead should be buried in white.
narrator: Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) says that Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say:
body: "Choose white clothing, as it is the best clothing. White clothing should be worn whilst living, and the dead should be buried in white.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ الْمُفَضَّلِ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ خُثَيْمٍ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ جُبَيْرٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: عَلَيْكُمْ بِالْبَيَاضِ مِنَ الثِّيَابِ، لِيَلْبِسْهَا أَحْيَاؤُكُمْ، وَكَفِّنُوا فِيهَا مَوْتَاكُمْ، فَإِنَّهَا مِنْ خِيَارِ ثِيَابِكُمْ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 65

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 66
englishRaw:
Samurah bin Jundub (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Wear white clothing because it is more taahir (paak) and clean, and also clothe your dead in it.
narrator: Samurah bin Jundub (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Wear white clothing because it is more taahir (paak) and clean, and also clothe your dead in it.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مَهْدِيٍّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنْ حَبِيبِ بْنِ أَبِي ثَابِتٍ، عَنْ مَيْمُونِ بْنِ أَبِي شَبِيبٍ، عَنْ سَمُرَةَ بْنِ جُنْدُبٍ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: الْبَسُوا الْبَيَاضَ، فَإِنَّهَا أَطْهَرُ وَأَطْيَبُ، وَكَفِّنُوا فِيهَا مَوْتَاكُمْ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 66

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 67
englishRaw:
Ummul Mu-mineen, 'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) reports:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ once left the house in the morning, wearing a sheet made of black hair."
narrator: Ummul Mu-mineen, 'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) reports:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ once left the house in the morning, wearing a sheet made of black hair."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَنِيعٍ، حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ زَكَرِيَّا بْنِ أَبِي زَائِدَةَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي، عَنْ مُصْعَبِ بْنِ شَيْبَةَ، عَنْ صَفِيَّةَ بِنْتِ شَيْبَةَ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ، قَالَتْ: خَرَجَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ ذَاتَ غَدَاةٍ، وَعَلَيْهِ مِرْطٌ مِنْ شَعَرٍ أَسْودَ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 67

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 68
englishRaw:
Mughirah bin Shu'bah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ wore a rumi Jubbah which had narrow sleeves.
narrator: Mughirah bin Shu'bah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ wore a rumi Jubbah which had narrow sleeves.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يُوسُفُ بْنُ عِيسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يُونُسُ بْنُ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ، عَنْ عُرْوَةَ بْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، لَبِسَ جُبَّةً رُومِيَّةً، ضَيِّقَةَ الْكُمَّيْنِ.
references: Book of The Dressing Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 68

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 69
englishRaw: Buraydah (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "Najaashi sent two simple black coloured socks as a gift to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He wore these and made mash over them after performing wudu".
body: Buraydah (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "Najaashi sent two simple black coloured socks as a gift to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He wore these and made mash over them after performing wudu".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هَنَّادُ بْنُ السَّرِيِّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ دَلْهَمِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ، عَنْ حُجَيْرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ، عَنِ ابْنِ بُرَيْدَةَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، أَنَّ النَّجَاشِيَّ أَهْدَى لِلنَّبِيِّ ﷺ، خُفَّيْنِ، أَسْوَدَيْنِ، سَاذَجَيْنِ، فَلَبِسَهُمَا ثُمَّ تَوَضَّأَ وَمَسَحَ عَلَيْهِمَا.
references: Book of The Socks of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 69

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 70
englishRaw:
Sayyidina Mughirah bin Shu'bah (may Allah be pleased with him) relates:
                      "Dihyah Kalbi sent to Messenger of Allah ﷺ as a gift two khuffs. In another narration it is stated that with the khuffs, a jubbah (a long coat) was also sent. Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not inquire if the skin was from slaughtered animals or not".
narrator: Sayyidina Mughirah bin Shu'bah (may Allah be pleased with him) relates:
body: "Dihyah Kalbi sent to Messenger of Allah ﷺ as a gift two khuffs. In another narration it is stated that with the khuffs, a jubbah (a long coat) was also sent. Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not inquire if the skin was from slaughtered animals or not".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ زَكَرِيَّا بْنِ أَبِي زَائِدَةَ، عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَيَّاشٍ، عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ، قَالَ: قَالَ الْمُغِيرَةُ بْنُ شُعْبَةَ: أَهْدَى دِحْيَةُ لِلنَّبِيِّ ﷺ خُفَّيْنِ، فَلَبِسَهُمَا وَقَالَ إِسْرَائِيلُ: عَنْ جَابِرٍ، عَنْ عَامِرٍ، وَجُبَّةً فَلَبِسَهُمَا حَتَّى تَخَرَّقَا لا يَدْرِي النَّبِيُّ ﷺ، أَذِكًى هُمَا أَمْ لا.
references: Book of The Socks of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 70

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 71
englishRaw: Qataadah (may Allah have mercy on him) reports that: "I asked Anas to describe the shoe of Messenger of Allah ﷺ". He replied: "Each shoe had two straps"
body: Qataadah (may Allah have mercy on him) reports that: "I asked Anas to describe the shoe of Messenger of Allah ﷺ". He replied: "Each shoe had two straps"
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو دَاوُدَ الطَّيَالِسِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا هَمَّامٌ، عَنْ، قَالَ: قُلْتُ لأَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ: كَيْفَ كَانَ نَعْلُ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ؟ قَالَ: لَهُمَا قِبَالانِ.
references: Book of The Shoes Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 71

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 72
englishRaw: Ibn 'Abbaas(may Allah be pleased with him) reports that Messenger of Allah ﷺ shoe had two double straps
body: Ibn 'Abbaas(may Allah be pleased with him) reports that Messenger of Allah ﷺ shoe had two double straps
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو كُرَيْبٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْعَلاءِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ سُفْيَانَ، عَنْ خَالِدٍ الْحَذَّاءِ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ الْحَارِثِ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ لِنَعْلِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ قِبَالانِ، مَثْنِيٌّ شِرَاكَهُمَا.
references: Book of The Shoes Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 72

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 73
englishRaw: 'Eesa bin Tahmaan says that Anas(may Allah be pleased with him)took out a pair of furless shoes and showed then to us. They had two straps. Later Thaabit told me these were the shoes of Messenger of Allah ﷺ.
body: 'Eesa bin Tahmaan says that Anas(may Allah be pleased with him)took out a pair of furless shoes and showed then to us. They had two straps. Later Thaabit told me these were the shoes of Messenger of Allah ﷺ.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَنِيعٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أَحْمَدَ الزُّبَيْرِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ طَهْمَانَ، قَالَ: أَخْرَجَ إِلَيْنَا أَنَسُ بْنُ مَالِكٍ نَعْلَيْنِ جَرْدَاوَيْنِ، لَهُمَا قِبَالانِ. قَالَ : فَحَدَّثَنِي ثَابِتٌ بَعْدُ عَنْ أَنَسُ ، أَنَّهُمَا كَانَتَا نَعْلَيِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ .
references: Book of The Shoes Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 73

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 74
englishRaw:
'Ubayd bin Jurayj(may Allah be pleased with him)asked Ibn 'Umar(may Allah be pleased with him)the reason for not wearing shoes with hair on them. He replied:
                      "I had seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ wear and perform wudu with shoes that did not have hair on them. That is why I also like this type of shoes"
narrator: 'Ubayd bin Jurayj(may Allah be pleased with him)asked Ibn 'Umar(may Allah be pleased with him)the reason for not wearing shoes with hair on them. He replied:
body: "I had seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ wear and perform wudu with shoes that did not have hair on them. That is why I also like this type of shoes"
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مُوسَى الأَنْصَارِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَعْنٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَالِكٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْمَقْبُرِيُّ، عَنْ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ جُرَيْجٍ، أَنَّهُ قَالَ لابْنِ عُمَرَ: رَأَيْتُكَ تَلْبَسُ النِّعَالَ السِّبْتِيَّةَ، قَالَ: إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ يَلْبَسُ النِّعَالَ الَّتِي لَيْسَ فِيهَا شَعَرٌ، وَيَتَوَضَّأُ فِيهَا، فَأَنَا أُحِبُّ أَنْ أَلْبَسَهَا.
references: Book of The Shoes Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 74

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 75
englishRaw: Abu hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that the shoes of Messenger of Allah ﷺ had two straps.
body: Abu hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that the shoes of Messenger of Allah ﷺ had two straps.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ، عَنْ مَعْمَرٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي ذِئْبٍ، عَنْ صَالِحٍ مَوْلَى التَّوْءَمَةِ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، قَالَ: كَانَ لِنَعْلِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ قِبَالانِ.
references: Book of The Shoes Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 75

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 76
englishRaw: Amr bin Hurayth(may Allah be pleased with him) reports, "I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform salaah with such shoes that had another leather sole sewn onto them.
body: Amr bin Hurayth(may Allah be pleased with him) reports, "I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform salaah with such shoes that had another leather sole sewn onto them.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَنِيعٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أَحْمَدَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنِ السُّدِّيِّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي مَنْ، سَمِعَ عَمْرَو بْنَ حُرَيْثٍ، يَقُولُ: رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، يُصَلِّي فِي نَعْلَيْنِ مَخْصُوفَتَيْنِ.
references: Book of The Shoes Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 76

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 77
englishRaw:
Abu Hurayrah reports:
                      Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: One should not wear one shoe and walk. Both shoes should be worn or both shoes should be removed.
narrator: Abu Hurayrah reports:
body: Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: One should not wear one shoe and walk. Both shoes should be worn or both shoes should be removed.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مُوسَى الأَنْصَارِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَعْنٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَالِكٌ، عَنْ أَبِي الزِّنَادِ، عَنِ الأَعْرَجِ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، قَالَ: لا يَمْشِيَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ فِي نَعْلٍ وَاحِدَةٍ، لِيُنْعِلْهُمَا جَمِيعًا، أَوْ لِيُحْفِهِمَا جَمِيعًا.
references: Book of The Shoes Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 77

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 78
englishRaw: Jaabir (may Allah be pleased with him) says that Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited eating with the left hand, or the wearing of one shoe only.
body: Jaabir (may Allah be pleased with him) says that Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited eating with the left hand, or the wearing of one shoe only.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مُوسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَعْنٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَالِكٌ، عَنْ أَبِي الزُّبَيْرِ، عَنْ جَابِرٍ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ نَهَى أَنْ يَأْكُلَ، يَعْنِي الرَّجُلَ، بِشِمَالِهِ، أَوْ يَمْشِيَ فِي نَعْلٍ وَاحِدَةٍ.
references: Book of The Shoes Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 78

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 79
englishRaw:
Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) says that Messenger of Allah ﷺ said:
                      "Whenever one amongst you puts on his shoes, he should begin with the right, and when he removes his shoes the left one should be removed first. The right should be first when putting on and last when removing the shoes.
narrator: Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) says that Messenger of Allah ﷺ said:
body: "Whenever one amongst you puts on his shoes, he should begin with the right, and when he removes his shoes the left one should be removed first. The right should be first when putting on and last when removing the shoes.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ، حوَحَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مُوسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَعْنٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَالِكٌ، عَنْ أَبِي الزِّنَادِ، عَنِ الأَعْرَجِ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، قَالَ: إِذَا انْتَعَلَ أَحَدُكُمْ فَلْيَبْدَأْ بِالْيَمِينِ، وَإِذَا نَزَعَ فَلْيَبْدَأْ بِالشِّمَالِ، فَلْتَكُنِ الْيَمِينُ أَوَّلَهُمَا تُنْعَلُ، وَآخِرَهُمَا تُنْزَعُ.
references: Book of The Shoes Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 79

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 80
englishRaw:
Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ while combing his hair ; wearing his shoes; and while washing his limbs during wudu, as far as possible began with his right.
narrator: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ while combing his hair ; wearing his shoes; and while washing his limbs during wudu, as far as possible began with his right.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو مُوسَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَشْعَثُ هُوَ ابْنُ أَبِي الشَّعْثَاءِ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ مَسْرُوقٍ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ، قَالَتْ: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يُحِبُّ التَّيَمُّنَ مَا اسْتَطَاعَ فِي تَرَجُّلِهِ، وَتَنَعُّلِهِ وَطُهُورِهِ.
references: Book of The Shoes Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 80

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 81
englishRaw: Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) says that the shoes of Messenger of Allah ﷺ had two straps. In the same manner the shoes of Abu Bakr and Umar(may Allah be pleased with him)had two straps on them. Sayyidina 'Uthman(may Allah be pleased with him)began the use of one strap.
body: Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) says that the shoes of Messenger of Allah ﷺ had two straps. In the same manner the shoes of Abu Bakr and Umar(may Allah be pleased with him)had two straps on them. Sayyidina 'Uthman(may Allah be pleased with him)began the use of one strap.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مَرْزُوقٍ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللهِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ قَيْسٍ أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا هِشَامٌ، عَنْ مُحَمَّدٍ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، قَالَ: كَانَ لِنَعْلِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ قِبَالانِ وَأَبِي بَكْرٍ وَعُمَرَ، وَأَوَّلُ مَنْ عَقَدَ عَقْدًا وَاحِدًا عُثْمَانُ رضي الله عنه..
references: Book of The Shoes Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 81

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 82
englishRaw: Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says that the ring of Messenger of Allah ﷺ was ,made of silver and the gem stone was from Abyssinia
body: Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says that the ring of Messenger of Allah ﷺ was ,made of silver and the gem stone was from Abyssinia
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، وَغَيْرُ وَاحِدٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ وَهْبٍ، عَنْ يُونُسَ، عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ خَاتَمُ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ مِنْ وَرِقٍ، وَكَانَ فَصُّهُ حَبَشِيًّا.
references: Book of The Mubarak Ring Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 82

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 83
englishRaw: Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) says that Messenger of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam had a ring made of silver. He used it as a seal (Stamp) on letters etc., but did not wear it
body: Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) says that Messenger of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam had a ring made of silver. He used it as a seal (Stamp) on letters etc., but did not wear it
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ، عَنْ أَبِي بِشْرٍ، عَنْ نَافِعٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ اتَّخَذَ خَاتَمًا مِنْ فِضَّةٍ، فَكَانَ يَخْتِمُ بِهِ وَلا يَلْبَسُهُ.
references: Book of The Mubarak Ring Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 83

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 84
englishRaw: Anas(may Allah be pleased with him) reports that Rasululah sallallahu alayhe wasallam had a ring made of silver and its (inlaid) gem was also of silver
body: Anas(may Allah be pleased with him) reports that Rasululah sallallahu alayhe wasallam had a ring made of silver and its (inlaid) gem was also of silver
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا حَفْصُ بْنُ عُمَرَ بْنِ عُبَيْدٍ هُوَ الطَّنَافِسِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا زُهَيْرٌ أَبُو خَيْثَمَةَ، عَنْ حُمَيْدٍ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ خَاتَمُ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، مِنْ فِضَّةٍ، فَصُّهُ مِنْهُ.
references: Book of The Mubarak Ring Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 84

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 85
englishRaw:
Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) relates:
                      "When Messenger of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam intended to write letters to the kings of 'Ajam (non arabs), inviting them to Islam, the people said that they did not accept letters without a seal (stamp) on them. Messenger of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam therefore had a ring made, the whiteness of which is still before my eyes.
narrator: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) relates:
body: "When Messenger of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam intended to write letters to the kings of 'Ajam (non arabs), inviting them to Islam, the people said that they did not accept letters without a seal (stamp) on them. Messenger of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam therefore had a ring made, the whiteness of which is still before my eyes.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ: لَمَّا أَرَادَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ أَنْ يَكْتُبَ إِلَى الْعَجَمِ قِيلَ لَهُ: إِنَّ الْعَجَمَ لا يَقْبَلُونَ إِلا كِتَابًا عَلَيْهِ خَاتَمٌ، فَاصْطَنَعَ خَاتَمًا، فَكَأَنِّي أَنْظُرُ إِلَى بَيَاضِهِ فِي كَفِّهِ.
references: Book of The Mubarak Ring Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 85

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 86
englishRaw: It is related from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the inscription engraved on the ring of Messenger of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam was 'Muhammad' on one line, 'Rasul' on a line, and 'Allah' on a line.
body: It is related from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the inscription engraved on the ring of Messenger of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam was 'Muhammad' on one line, 'Rasul' on a line, and 'Allah' on a line.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ الأَنْصَارِيِّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي، عَنْ ثُمَامَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ نَقْشُ خَاتَمِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ: مُحَمَّدٌ سَطْرٌ، وَرَسُولٌ سَطْرٌ، وَاللَّهُ سَطْرٌ.
references: Book of The Mubarak Ring Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 86

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 87
englishRaw:
Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that:
                      Messenger of Allah ﷺ made an intention to write letters to Kisra, Qaysur (Ceasar) and Najashi, inviting them to accept Islaam. The people said: '(O Messenger of Allah) those people do not accept letters without a stamp on it'. For this reason Messenger of Allah ﷺ had a stamp made. The ring (loop) of which was silver, and had 'Muhammad Messenger of Allah' engraved on it".
narrator: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that:
body: Messenger of Allah ﷺ made an intention to write letters to Kisra, Qaysur (Ceasar) and Najashi, inviting them to accept Islaam. The people said: '(O Messenger of Allah) those people do not accept letters without a stamp on it'. For this reason Messenger of Allah ﷺ had a stamp made. The ring (loop) of which was silver, and had 'Muhammad Messenger of Allah' engraved on it".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا نَصْرُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْجَهْضَمِيُّ أَبُو عَمْرٍو، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا نُوحُ بْنُ قَيْسٍ، عَنْ خَالِدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَتَبَ إِلَى كِسْرَى وَقَيْصَرَ وَالنَّجَاشِيِّ، فَقِيلَ لَهُ: إِنَّهُمْ لا يَقْبَلُونَ كِتَابًا، إِلا بِخَاتَمٍ، فَصَاغَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، خَاتَمًا حَلْقَتُهُ فِضَّةٌ، وَنُقِشَ فِيهِ: مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللهِ.
references: Book of The Mubarak Ring Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 87

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 88
englishRaw:
Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) reports:
                      "When Messenger of Allah ﷺ went to the toilet, he removed his ring"
narrator: Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) reports:
body: "When Messenger of Allah ﷺ went to the toilet, he removed his ring"
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ عَامِرٍ، وَالْحَجَّاجُ بْنُ مِنْهَالٍ، عَنْ هَمَّامٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ جُرَيْجٍ، عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ إِذَا دَخَلَ الْخَلاءَ نَزَعَ خَاتَمَهُ.
references: Book of The Mubarak Ring Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 88

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 89
englishRaw: Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) says. "Messenger of Allah ﷺ kept his ring in his mubaarak hands (possession). Then it was kept by Abubakr (may Allah be pleased with him), then by 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him). Thereafter by 'Uthmaan (may Allah be pleased with him). In his ('Uthmaan (may Allah be pleased with him)'s) time it fell in the Well of 'Arees. The inscription on this ring was 'Muhammadur Messenger of Allah"'.
body: Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) says. "Messenger of Allah ﷺ kept his ring in his mubaarak hands (possession). Then it was kept by Abubakr (may Allah be pleased with him), then by 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him). Thereafter by 'Uthmaan (may Allah be pleased with him). In his ('Uthmaan (may Allah be pleased with him)'s) time it fell in the Well of 'Arees. The inscription on this ring was 'Muhammadur Messenger of Allah"'.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ نُمَيْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عُمَرَ، عَنْ نَافِعٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ، قَالَ: اتَّخَذَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، خَاتَمًا مِنْ وَرِقٍ، فَكَانَ فِي يَدِهِ ثُمَّ كَانَ فِي يَدِ أَبِي بَكْرٍ، وَيَدِ عُمَرَ، ثُمَّ كَانَ فِي يَدِ عُثْمَانَ، حَتَّى وَقَعَ فِي بِئْرِ أَرِيسٍ، نَقْشُهُ: مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللهِ.
references: Book of The Mubarak Ring Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 89

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 90
englishRaw:
'Ali bin Abi Taalib (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ wore his ring in the right hand"
narrator: 'Ali bin Abi Taalib (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ wore his ring in the right hand"
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَهْلِ بْنِ عَسْكَرٍ الْبَغْدَادِيُّ، وَعَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، قَالا: أَخْبَرَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَسَّانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ بِلالٍ، عَنْ شَرِيكِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ أَبِي نَمِرٍ، عَنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ حُنَيْنٍ، عَنِ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ يَلْبَسُ خَاتَمَهُ فِي يَمِينِهِ.
references: Book of Stating That Prophet of Allah ﷺ Wore The Ring On His Right Hand, Hadith 90

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 91
englishRaw: Hammaad bin Salamah says that he saw Abdur Rahman bin Abi Rafe' wearing a ring on his right hand. He asked him the reason and he replied, "I had seen Abdullah bin Ja'far (may Allah be pleased with him) wearing a ring on his right hand, and he said that he had seen the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wear a ring on the right hand."
body: Hammaad bin Salamah says that he saw Abdur Rahman bin Abi Rafe' wearing a ring on his right hand. He asked him the reason and he replied, "I had seen Abdullah bin Ja'far (may Allah be pleased with him) wearing a ring on his right hand, and he said that he had seen the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wear a ring on the right hand."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَنِيعٍ ، قَالَ : حَدَّثَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ ، عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ ، قَالَ : رَأَيْتُ ابْنَ أَبِي رَافِعٍ يَتَخَتَّمُ فِي يَمِينِهِ فَسَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ ذَلِكَ , فَقَالَ : رَأَيْتُ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ يَتَخَتَّمُ فِي يَمِينِهِ وَقَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ :  " كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَتَخَتَّمُ فِي يَمِينِهِ " .
references: Book of Stating That Prophet of Allah ﷺ Wore The Ring On His Right Hand, Hadith 91

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 92
englishRaw: It is related from Abdullah bin Ja'far (may Allah be pleased with him) from another source (another chain of narrators) that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore a ring on the right hand
body: It is related from Abdullah bin Ja'far (may Allah be pleased with him) from another source (another chain of narrators) that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore a ring on the right hand
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ مُوسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ نُمَيْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْفَضْلِ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَقِيلٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ يَتَخَتَّمُ فِي يَمِينِهِ.
references: Book of Stating That Prophet of Allah ﷺ Wore The Ring On His Right Hand, Hadith 92

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 93
englishRaw: Jabir bin Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "The Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore the ring on the right hand."
body: Jabir bin Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "The Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore the ring on the right hand."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْخَطَّابِ زِيَادُ بْنُ يَحْيَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ مَيْمُونٍ، عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ يَتَخَتَّمُ فِي يَمِينِهِ.
references: Book of Stating That Prophet of Allah ﷺ Wore The Ring On His Right Hand, Hadith 93

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 94
englishRaw: Salt bin Abdullah says that Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) wore a ring on the right hand, and as far as I can remember he used to say that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ also wore it on the right hand
body: Salt bin Abdullah says that Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) wore a ring on the right hand, and as far as I can remember he used to say that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ also wore it on the right hand
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ الرَّازِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا جَرِيرٌ، عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ، عَنِ الصَّلتِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ، قَالَ: كَانَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ، يَتَخَتَّمُ فِي يَمِينِهِ، وَلا إِخَالُهُ إِلا قَالَ: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يَتَخَتَّمُ فِي يَمِينِهِ.
references: Book of Stating That Prophet of Allah ﷺ Wore The Ring On His Right Hand, Hadith 94

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 95
englishRaw: Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, "The Prophet of Allah ﷺ had a ring made of silver. The top portion remained towards the inside. On it was engraved 'Muhammad the Rasoolullah'. The people were prohibited from making this inscription on their rings. This is the same ring which fell from the hands of Mu'ayqib (may Allah be pleased with him) into the well of Arees during the reign of Uthman (may Allah be pleased with him).
body: Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, "The Prophet of Allah ﷺ had a ring made of silver. The top portion remained towards the inside. On it was engraved 'Muhammad the Rasoolullah'. The people were prohibited from making this inscription on their rings. This is the same ring which fell from the hands of Mu'ayqib (may Allah be pleased with him) into the well of Arees during the reign of Uthman (may Allah be pleased with him).
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عُمَرَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيان، عَنْ أَيُّوبَ بْنِ مُوسَى، عَنْ نَافِعٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ اتَّخَذَ خَاتَمًا مِنْ فِضَّةٍ، وَجَعَلَ فَصَّهُ مِمَّا يَلِي كَفَّهُ، وَنَقَشَ فِيهِ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللهِ، وَنَهَى أَنْ يَنْقُشَ أَحَدٌ عَلَيْهِ وَهُوَ الَّذِي سَقَطَ مِنْ مُعَيْقِيبٍ فِي بِئْرِ أَرِيسٍ.
references: Book of Stating That Prophet of Allah ﷺ Wore The Ring On His Right Hand, Hadith 95

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 96
englishRaw: Imam Muhammad Baaqir relates that Hasan (may Allah be pleased with him) and Husain (may Allah be pleased with him), both wore their rings on their left hands
body: Imam Muhammad Baaqir relates that Hasan (may Allah be pleased with him) and Husain (may Allah be pleased with him), both wore their rings on their left hands
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قتيبة بن سعيد , حَدَّثَنَا حاتم بن إسماعيل , عن جَعْفَرٍ بن محمد , عن أبيه , قَالَ: كان الحسن والحسين يتختمان في يسارهما.
references: Book of Stating That Prophet of Allah ﷺ Wore The Ring On His Right Hand, Hadith 96

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 97
englishRaw: It is related from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore a ring on the right hand, and some people have also related from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore a ring on the left hand
body: It is related from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore a ring on the right hand, and some people have also related from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore a ring on the left hand
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى وَهُوَ ابْنُ الطَّبَّاعِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبَّادُ بْنُ الْعَوَّامِ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي عَرُوبَةَ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ: أَنَّهُ ﷺ كَانَ يَتَخَتَّمُ فِي يَمِينِهِ.
references: Book of Stating That Prophet of Allah ﷺ Wore The Ring On His Right Hand, Hadith 97

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 98
englishRaw: Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ had a ring made of gold which he wore on his right hand. The Sahabah (may Allah be pleased with him)m in imitating the Prophet of Allah ﷺ also had gold rings made for themselves. Thereafter, the Prophet of Allah sallallah alaihe wasallam threw away the gold ring and said, "I will never wear it again."
body: Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ had a ring made of gold which he wore on his right hand. The Sahabah (may Allah be pleased with him)m in imitating the Prophet of Allah ﷺ also had gold rings made for themselves. Thereafter, the Prophet of Allah sallallah alaihe wasallam threw away the gold ring and said, "I will never wear it again."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عُبَيْدِ اللهِ الْمُحَارِبِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ أَبِي حَازِمٍ، عَنْ مُوسَى بْنِ عُقْبَةَ، عَنْ نَافِعٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ، قَالَ: اتَّخَذَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ خَاتَمًا مِنْ ذَهَبٍ، فَكَانَ يَلْبَسُهُ فِي يَمِينِهِ، فَاتَّخَذَ النَّاسُ خَوَاتِيمَ مِنْ ذَهَبٍ فَطَرَحَهُ ﷺ، وَقَالَ: لا أَلْبَسُهُ أَبدًا فَطَرَحَ النَّاسُ خَوَاتِيمَهُمْ.
references: Book of Stating That Prophet of Allah ﷺ Wore The Ring On His Right Hand, Hadith 98

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 99
englishRaw: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that the handle of the sword of the Prophet of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam was made of silver.
body: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that the handle of the sword of the Prophet of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam was made of silver.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَهْبُ بْنُ جَرِيرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ، قَالَ: كَانَتْ قَبِيعَةُ سَيْفِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ مِنْ فِضَّةٍ.
references: Book of The Sword Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 99

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 100
englishRaw: Saeed bin Abil Hasan Basri (may Allah be pleased with him) has related the same hadith that the handle grip of the sword of the Prophet of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam was made of silver.
body: Saeed bin Abil Hasan Basri (may Allah be pleased with him) has related the same hadith that the handle grip of the sword of the Prophet of Allah sallallahu alayhe wasallam was made of silver.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ، قَالَ: كَانَتْ قَبِيعَةُ سَيْفِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ مِنْ فِضَّةٍ.
references: Book of The Sword Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 100

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 101
englishRaw: Mazeedah bin Malik, the (maternal) grandfather of Hud says that when the Prophet of Allah salalahu alayhi wasallam entered Makkah on the day it was conquered, his sword had gold and silver on it.Talib who is one of the narrators of this hadith says that he asked the ustaadh, "On which part of the sword was the silver?" He replied, "The cap of the grip handle was made of silver.
body: Mazeedah bin Malik, the (maternal) grandfather of Hud says that when the Prophet of Allah salalahu alayhi wasallam entered Makkah on the day it was conquered, his sword had gold and silver on it.Talib who is one of the narrators of this hadith says that he asked the ustaadh, "On which part of the sword was the silver?" He replied, "The cap of the grip handle was made of silver.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ صُدْرَانَ الْبَصْرِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا طَالِبُ بْنُ حُجَيْرٍ، عَنْ هُودٍ وَهُوَ ابْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ، عَنْ جَدِّهِ، قَالَ: دَخَلَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ مَكَّةَ يَوْمَ الْفَتْحِ وَعَلَى سَيْفِهِ ذَهَبٌ، وَفِضَّةٌ، قَالَ طَالِبٌ: فَسَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْفِضَّةِ، فَقَالَ: كَانَتْ قَبِيعَةُ السَّيْفِ فِضَّةً.
references: Book of The Sword Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 101

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 102
englishRaw: Ibn Seereen says, "I made my sword like the sword of Samurah bin Jundub (may Allah be pleased with him). He said that he had his sword made in the same manner as the one the Prophet of Allah ﷺ had. The sword was the type used by the tribe of Banu Hanifah.
body: Ibn Seereen says, "I made my sword like the sword of Samurah bin Jundub (may Allah be pleased with him). He said that he had his sword made in the same manner as the one the Prophet of Allah ﷺ had. The sword was the type used by the tribe of Banu Hanifah.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا محمد بن شجاع البغدادى , حَدَّثَنَا أبو عبيدة الحداد , عن عثمان بن سعد , عن ابن سيرين قال: صنعت سيفي على سيف سمرة بن جندب: وزعم سمرة أنه صنع سَيْفِه على سيف رَسُولِ اللهِﷺ , وكان حنيفيا.
references: Book of The Sword Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 102

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 103
englishRaw: Zubair bin Al-Awwaam (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore two suits of armour on his auspicious body in the Battle of Uhud (Dhaatul Fadl and Fiddah). The Prophet of Allah ﷺ intended climbing a hill but (since it was huge and due to the heavy weight of the two armours and the difficulties he confronted causing his auspicious face to bleed, as a result) he could not do so. He therefore requested Talhah (may Allah be pleased with him) to sit and, with his aid, climbed the hill. Zubair (may Allah be pleased with him) said, "I heard the Prophet of Allah ﷺ say, "It has become wajib (Jannah or the intercession of the Prophet of Allah ﷺ) for Talhah.
body: Zubair bin Al-Awwaam (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore two suits of armour on his auspicious body in the Battle of Uhud (Dhaatul Fadl and Fiddah). The Prophet of Allah ﷺ intended climbing a hill but (since it was huge and due to the heavy weight of the two armours and the difficulties he confronted causing his auspicious face to bleed, as a result) he could not do so. He therefore requested Talhah (may Allah be pleased with him) to sit and, with his aid, climbed the hill. Zubair (may Allah be pleased with him) said, "I heard the Prophet of Allah ﷺ say, "It has become wajib (Jannah or the intercession of the Prophet of Allah ﷺ) for Talhah.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو سَعِيدٍ عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ الأَشَجُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يُونُسُ بْنُ بُكَيْرٍ، عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ، عَنْ يَحْيَى بْنِ عَبَّادِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ الزُّبَيْرِ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ جَدِّهِ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ الزُّبَيْرِ، عَنِ الزُّبَيْرِ بْنِ الْعَوَّامِ، قَالَ: كَانَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ﷺ يَوْمَ أُحُدٍ دِرْعَانِ، فَنَهَضَ إِلَى الصَّخْرَةِ فَلَمْ يَسْتَطِعْ، فَأَقْعَدَ طَلْحَةَ تَحْتَهُ، وَصَعِدَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ حَتَّى اسْتَوَى عَلَى الصَّخْرَةِ، قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، يَقُولُ: أَوْجَبَ طَلْحَةُ.
references: Book of The Armor Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 103

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 104
englishRaw: Saa'ib bin Yazeed (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "In the Battle of Uhud the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore two suits of armour. He wore one over the other.
body: Saa'ib bin Yazeed (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "In the Battle of Uhud the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore two suits of armour. He wore one over the other.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِي عُمَرَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ، عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ خُصَيْفَةَ، عَنِ السَّائِب بْنِ يَزِيدَ، أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، كَانَ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ أُحُدٍ دِرْعَانِ، قَدْ ظَاهَرَ بَيْنَهُمَا.
references: Book of The Armor Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 104

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 105
englishRaw: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that, on the day when Makkah was conquered, the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore a helmet when they entered the city. (The Prophet of Allah ﷺ removed the helmet after being satisfied that everything was under control). Someone came to the Prophet of Allah ﷺ and said, "O' Messenger of Allah, this Ibn Khatl is holding the cover (black cloth) of the Ka'bah." The Prophet of Allah ﷺ replied, "Kill him.
body: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that, on the day when Makkah was conquered, the Prophet of Allah ﷺ wore a helmet when they entered the city. (The Prophet of Allah ﷺ removed the helmet after being satisfied that everything was under control). Someone came to the Prophet of Allah ﷺ and said, "O' Messenger of Allah, this Ibn Khatl is holding the cover (black cloth) of the Ka'bah." The Prophet of Allah ﷺ replied, "Kill him.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَالِكُ بْنُ أَنَسٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ دَخَلَ مَكَّةَ وَعَلَيْهِ مِغْفَرٌ، فَقِيلَ لَهُ: هَذَا ابْنُ خَطَلٍ مُتَعَلِّقٌ بِأَسْتَارِ الْكَعْبَةِ، فَقَالَ: اقْتُلُوهُ.
references: Book of The Helmet Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 105

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 106
englishRaw: It is related from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ, when entering Makkah as a conqueror, wore a helmet on his auspicious head. After he had removed it, a person came and said, "O' Messenger of Allah, Ibn Khatl is clinging to the cover of the Ka'bah."The Prophet of Allah ﷺ replied, "He is not of the ones who have been granted amnesty, kill him."Ibn Shihaab Zuhri says, "I have been informed that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ was not in the state of Ihraam.
body: It is related from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ, when entering Makkah as a conqueror, wore a helmet on his auspicious head. After he had removed it, a person came and said, "O' Messenger of Allah, Ibn Khatl is clinging to the cover of the Ka'bah."The Prophet of Allah ﷺ replied, "He is not of the ones who have been granted amnesty, kill him."Ibn Shihaab Zuhri says, "I have been informed that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ was not in the state of Ihraam.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ أَحْمَدَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ وَهْبٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي مَالِكُ بْنُ أَنَسٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، دَخَلَ مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفَتْحِ، وَعَلَى رَأْسِهِ الْمِغْفَرُ، قَالَ: فَلَمَّا نَزَعَهُ جَاءَهُ رَجُلٌ، فَقَالَ لَهُ: ابْنُ خَطَلٍ مُتَعَلِّقٌ بِأَسْتَارِ الْكَعْبَةِ، فَقَالَ: اقْتُلُوهُ، قَالَ ابْنُ شِهَابٍ: وَبَلَغَنِي أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، لَمْ يَكُنْ يَوْمَئِذٍ مُحْرِمًا.
references: Book of The Helmet Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 106

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 107
englishRaw: Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that when Makkah was conquered, Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered the city wearing a black turban
body: Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that when Makkah was conquered, Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered the city wearing a black turban
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مَهْدِيٍّ، عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ (ح) حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ، عَنْ أَبِي الزُّبَيْرِ، عَنْ جَابِرٍ، قَالَ: دَخَلَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ، مَكَّةَ يَوْمَ الْفَتْحِ، وَعَلَيْهِ عِمَامَةٌ سَوْدَاءُ.
references: Book of The Turban Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 107

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 108
englishRaw: Amr bin Huraith (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "I had seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ wear a black turban.
body: Amr bin Huraith (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "I had seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ wear a black turban.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عُمَرَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنْ مُسَاوِرٍ الْوَرَّاقِ، عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ عَمْرِو بْنِ حُرَيْثٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، قَالَ: رَأَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ يَخْطُبُ عَلَى الْمِنْبَرِ، وَعَلَيْهِ عِمَامَةٌ سَوْدَاءُ.
references: Book of The Turban Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 108

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 109
englishRaw: Amr bin Huraith (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that Sayyidina Messenger of Allah ﷺ was once delivering the sermon, and there was a black turban on his auspicious head.
body: Amr bin Huraith (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that Sayyidina Messenger of Allah ﷺ was once delivering the sermon, and there was a black turban on his auspicious head.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، وَيُوسُفُ بْنُ عِيسَى، قَالا: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ مُسَاوِرٍ الْوَرَّاقِ، عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ عَمْرُو بْنِ حُرَيْثٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، خَطَبَ النَّاسَ، وَعَلَيْهِ عِمَامَةٌ سَوْدَاءُ.
references: Book of The Turban Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 109

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 110
englishRaw: Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him)ma reports, "When Messenger of Allah ﷺ fastened an amaamah (turban), he used to put the shamlah between his shoulers (i.e. he used to put it on the back)."Nafi says, "I had seen Abdullah bin Umar (may Allah be pleased with him)ma do it in the same manner."Ubaidullah, who is the student of Nafi, says, "In my time the grandson of Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him), Qasim bin Muhammad and the grandson of Umar radiyallah anhu, Saalim bin Abdullah did the same.
body: Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him)ma reports, "When Messenger of Allah ﷺ fastened an amaamah (turban), he used to put the shamlah between his shoulers (i.e. he used to put it on the back)."Nafi says, "I had seen Abdullah bin Umar (may Allah be pleased with him)ma do it in the same manner."Ubaidullah, who is the student of Nafi, says, "In my time the grandson of Abu Bakr (may Allah be pleased with him), Qasim bin Muhammad and the grandson of Umar radiyallah anhu, Saalim bin Abdullah did the same.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هَارُونُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْهَمْدَانِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْمَدَنِيُّ، عَنْ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ، عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عُمَرَ، عَنْ نَافِعٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ عُمَرَ، قَالَ: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ، إِذَا اعْتَمَّ، سَدَلَ عِمَامَتَهُ بَيْنَ كَتِفَيْهِ..
references: Book of The Turban Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 110

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 111
englishRaw: Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him)ma reports, "Sayyidina Messenger of Allah ﷺ was once delivering a sermon. He was wearing a black turban, or an oily strip of cloth.
body: Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him)ma reports, "Sayyidina Messenger of Allah ﷺ was once delivering a sermon. He was wearing a black turban, or an oily strip of cloth.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يُوسُفُ بْنُ عِيسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو سُلَيْمَانَ وَهُوَ عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ الْغَسِيلِ، عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ خَطَبَ النَّاسَ، وَعَلَيْهِ عِصَابَةٌ دَسْمَاءُ.
references: Book of The Turban Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 111

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 112
englishRaw: Abu Burdah bin Musa Al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, "Aishah radyiallahu anha showed us a patched sheet, and the thick coarse lungi, then said, "When Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed away, he was wearing these clothes.
body: Abu Burdah bin Musa Al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, "Aishah radyiallahu anha showed us a patched sheet, and the thick coarse lungi, then said, "When Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed away, he was wearing these clothes.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَنِيعٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَيُّوبُ، عَنْ حُمَيْدِ بْنِ هِلالٍ، عَنْ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ، قَالَ: أَخْرَجَتْ إِلَيْنَا عَائِشَةُ، كِسَاءً مُلَبَّدًا، وَإِزَارًا غَلِيظًا، فَقَالَتْ: قُبِضَ رُوحُ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، فِي هَذَيْنِ.
references: Book of The Lungi Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 112

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 113
englishRaw: Ubaid bin Khalid (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "I was once going to Madinah Munawwarah. I heard a person from behind me say, "Wear the lungi higher because it avoids physical and spiratual najaasah (impurities)." (The lungi will remain cleaner and will not become dirty by being dragged on the ground.)When I turned to see who was talking, I saw that it was Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I said, "O' Messenger of Allah, this is a simple lungi, how can one become proud, and it is necessary to look after it (keep it clean)?"Messenger of Allah ﷺ replied, "If you see no benefit in it, your following me has not ceased."While Messenger of Allah ﷺ was telling me this, I saw that his lungi reached till half his him."
body: Ubaid bin Khalid (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "I was once going to Madinah Munawwarah. I heard a person from behind me say, "Wear the lungi higher because it avoids physical and spiratual najaasah (impurities)." (The lungi will remain cleaner and will not become dirty by being dragged on the ground.)When I turned to see who was talking, I saw that it was Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I said, "O' Messenger of Allah, this is a simple lungi, how can one become proud, and it is necessary to look after it (keep it clean)?"Messenger of Allah ﷺ replied, "If you see no benefit in it, your following me has not ceased."While Messenger of Allah ﷺ was telling me this, I saw that his lungi reached till half his him."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو دَاوُدَ، عَنْ شُعْبَةَ، عَنِ الأَشْعَثِ بْنِ سُلَيْمٍ، قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ عَمَّتِي، تُحَدِّثُ عَنْ عَمِّهَا، قَالَ: بَيْنَا أَنَا أَمشِي بِالْمَدِينَةِ، إِذَا إِنْسَانٌ خَلْفِي يَقُولُ: ارْفَعْ إِزَارَكَ، فَإِنَّهُ أَتْقَى وَأَبْقَى فَإِذَا هُوَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، فَقُلْتُ: يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ إِنَّمَا هِيَ بُرْدَةٌ مَلْحَاءُ، قَالَ: أَمَا لَكَ فِيَّ أُسْوَةٌ؟ فَنَظَرْتُ فَإِذَا إِزَارُهُ إِلَى نِصْفِ سَاقَيْهِ.
references: Book of The Lungi Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 113

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 114
englishRaw: Salamah bin Akwa (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "Uthman (may Allah be pleased with him) wore his lungi till the middle of his shin and said, "This is how my master Messenger of Allah ﷺ wore his lungi."
body: Salamah bin Akwa (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "Uthman (may Allah be pleased with him) wore his lungi till the middle of his shin and said, "This is how my master Messenger of Allah ﷺ wore his lungi."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا سُوَيْدُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ، عَنْ مُوسَى بْنِ عُبَيْدَةَ، عَنِ إِيَاسِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ بْنِ الأَكْوَعِ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، قَالَ: كَانَ عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عَفَّانَ، يَأْتَزِرُ إِلَى أَنْصَافِ سَاقَيْهِ، وَقَالَ: هَكَذَا كَانَتْ إِزْرَةُ صَاحِبِي، يَعْنِي النَّبِيَّ ﷺ.
references: Book of The Lungi Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 114

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 115
englishRaw: Hudhaifah bin Al-Yamaan (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that Messenger of Allah ﷺ caught the shin of my leg, or of his own leg and said, "This is where the lungi should reach, and if not, then a little further down, and if not, then the lungi has no right on the ankle." (For this reason the lungi should not reach over the ankles.
body: Hudhaifah bin Al-Yamaan (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that Messenger of Allah ﷺ caught the shin of my leg, or of his own leg and said, "This is where the lungi should reach, and if not, then a little further down, and if not, then the lungi has no right on the ankle." (For this reason the lungi should not reach over the ankles.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الأَحْوَصِ، عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، عَنْ مُسْلِمِ بْنِ نَذِيرٍ، عَنْ حُذَيْفَةَ بْنِ الْيَمَانِ، قَالَ: أَخَذَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، بِعَضَلَةِ سَاقِي أَوْ سَاقِهِ، فَقَالَ: هَذَا مَوْضِعُ الإِزَارِ، فَإِنْ أَبَيْتَ فَأَسْفَلَ، فَإِنْ أَبَيْتَ فَلا حَقَّ لِلإِزَارِ فِي الْكَعْبَيْنِ.
references: Book of The Lungi Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 115

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 116
englishRaw: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "I did not see anyone more handsome as Messenger of Allah ﷺ. It was as if the brightness of the sun had shone from his auspicious face. I did not see anyone walk faster than him, as if the earth folded for him. A few moments ago he would be here, and then there. We found it difficult to keep pace when we walked with him, and he walked at his normal pace.
body: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "I did not see anyone more handsome as Messenger of Allah ﷺ. It was as if the brightness of the sun had shone from his auspicious face. I did not see anyone walk faster than him, as if the earth folded for him. A few moments ago he would be here, and then there. We found it difficult to keep pace when we walked with him, and he walked at his normal pace.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ لَهِيعَةَ، عَنْ أَبِي يُونُسَ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، قَالَ: وَلا رَأَيْتُ شَيْئًا أَحْسَنَ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ كَأَنَّ الشَّمْسَ تَجْرِي فِي وَجْهِهِ، وَمَا رَأَيْتُ أَحَدًا أَسْرَعَ فِي مِشْيَتِهِ مِنْ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ كَأَنَّمَا الأَرْضُ تُطْوَى لَهُ إِنَّا لَنُجْهِدُ أَنْفُسَنَا وَإِنَّهُ لَغَيْرُ مُكْتَرِثٍ.
references: Book of The Walking Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 116

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 117
englishRaw:
Ebrahim bin Muhammad says:
                      "When 'Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) described Messenger of Allah ﷺ, he used to say: Messenger of Allah ﷺ walked, he lifted his leg with vigour. He did not drag his feet on the ground like women do. When he walked, because of the speed and force of the legs, it seemed as if he was descending from a high place"
narrator: Ebrahim bin Muhammad says:
body: "When 'Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) described Messenger of Allah ﷺ, he used to say: Messenger of Allah ﷺ walked, he lifted his leg with vigour. He did not drag his feet on the ground like women do. When he walked, because of the speed and force of the legs, it seemed as if he was descending from a high place"
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرٍ، وَغَيْرُ وَاحِدٍ، قَالُوا: حَدَّثَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ، عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ مَوْلَى غُفْرَةَ، قَالَ: أَخْبَرَنِي إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ مِنْ وَلَدِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ عَلِيٌّ إِذَا وَصَفَ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، قَالَ: كَانَ إِذَا مَشَى تَقَلَّعَ كَأَنَّمَا يَنْحَطُّ مِنْ صَبَبٍ.
references: Book of The Walking Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 117

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 118
englishRaw:
Ali bin Abi Taalib (may Allah be pleased with him)' says:
                      "When Messenger of Allah ﷺ walked he bent slightly forward as if he was descending from a high place".This has been explained in the previous ahaadith.
narrator: Ali bin Abi Taalib (may Allah be pleased with him)' says:
body: "When Messenger of Allah ﷺ walked he bent slightly forward as if he was descending from a high place".This has been explained in the previous ahaadith.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ بْنُ وَكِيعٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي، عَنِ الْمَسْعُودِيِّ، عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ مُسْلِمِ بْنِ هُرْمُزَ، عَنْ نَافِعِ بْنِ جُبَيْرِ بْنِ مُطْعِمٍ، عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ إِذَا مَشَى، تَكَفَّأَ تَكَفُّؤًا، كَأَنَّمَا يَنْحَطُّ مِنْ صَبَبٍ.
references: Book of The Walking Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 118

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 119
englishRaw: Anas bin Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "Rasoollullah ﷺ often wore a cloth on his auspicious head. This cloth, because of its greasiness, looked as if had been oiled.
body: Anas bin Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) says, "Rasoollullah ﷺ often wore a cloth on his auspicious head. This cloth, because of its greasiness, looked as if had been oiled.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يُوسُفُ بْنُ عِيسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الرَّبِيعُ بْنُ صَبِيحٍ، عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ أَبَانَ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يُكْثِرُ الْقِنَاعَ، كَأَنَّ ثَوْبَهُ ثَوْبُ زَيَّاتٍ.
references: Book of The Qinaa Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 119

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 120
englishRaw:
Qaylah bint Makhramah (may Allah be pleased with her) reports:
                      "I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ in the masjid (in a very humble posture) sitting in a qarfasaa posture. Due to his awe-inspiring personality, I began shivering'.
narrator: Qaylah bint Makhramah (may Allah be pleased with her) reports:
body: "I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ in the masjid (in a very humble posture) sitting in a qarfasaa posture. Due to his awe-inspiring personality, I began shivering'.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَفَّانُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ حَسَّانَ، عَنْ، جَدَّتَيْهِ، عَنْ قَيْلَةَ بِنْتِ مَخْرَمَةَ، أَنَّهَا رَأَتْ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ، وَهُوَ قَاعِدٌ الْقُرْفُصَاءَ، قَالَتْ: فَلَمَّا رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، الْمُتَخَشِّعَ فِي الْجِلْسَةِ، أُرْعِدْتُ مِنَ الْفَرَقِ.
references: Book of The Sitting Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 120

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 121
englishRaw:
The uncle of 'Abbaad bin Tamim, 'Abdullah bin Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) reports:
                      "I have seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ lying flat on his back in the masjid, with one leg resting on the other.
narrator: The uncle of 'Abbaad bin Tamim, 'Abdullah bin Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) reports:
body: "I have seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ lying flat on his back in the masjid, with one leg resting on the other.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْمَخْزُومِيُّ، وَغَيْرُ وَاحِدٍ، قَالُوا: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ، عَنْ عَبَّادِ بْنِ تَمِيمٍ، عَنْ عَمِّهِ، أَنَّهُ رَأَى النَّبِيَّ ﷺ مُسْتَلْقِيًا فِي الْمَسْجِدِ وَاضِعًا إِحْدَى رِجْلَيْهِ عَلَى الأُخْرَى.
references: Book of The Sitting Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 121

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 122
englishRaw:
Abu Sa'eed Khudari (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "When Rasuluilah ﷺ sat in the rnasjid, he sat in the qarfasaa posture'
narrator: Abu Sa'eed Khudari (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "When Rasuluilah ﷺ sat in the rnasjid, he sat in the qarfasaa posture'
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا سَلَمَةُ بْنُ شَبِيبٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ الْمَدَنِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الأَنْصَارِيُّ، عَنْ رُبَيْحِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ جَدِّهِ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيِّ، قَالَ: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ إِذَا جَلَسَ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ، احْتَبَى بِيَدَيْهِ.
references: Book of The Sitting Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 122

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 123
englishRaw: Jaabir bin Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, "I observed Messenger of Allah ﷺ lean on a pillow which was on his left side".
body: Jaabir bin Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, "I observed Messenger of Allah ﷺ lean on a pillow which was on his left side".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبَّاسُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الدُّورِيُّ الْبَغْدَادِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ، عَنِ إِسْرَائِيلَ، عَنْ سِمَاكِ بْنِ حَرْبٍ، عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ سَمُرَةَ، قَالَ: رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، مُتَّكِئًا عَلَى وِسَادَةٍ عَلَى يَسَارِهِ.
references: Book of The Pillow Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 123

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 124
englishRaw:
Abu Bakrah (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that, "Messenger of Allah ﷺ once said, :
                     Must I show you a great sin, from among the greatest sins?" The sahaabah replied, "Yes O Messenger of Allah ﷺ, do tell us." Messenger of Allah ﷺ replied, "To ascribe a partner unto Allah. To disobey one's parents. To bare false witness, (or tell a lie). (The narrator is not sure which of the two Sayyidina Messenger of Allah ﷺ had said). At that time Messenger of Allah ﷺ was leaning on something. When he mentioned lies, he sat up, and because of its importance began to repeat it many times, till we began hoping that he would stop, and not repeat it so many times".
narrator: Abu Bakrah (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that, "Messenger of Allah ﷺ once said, :
body: Must I show you a great sin, from among the greatest sins?" The sahaabah replied, "Yes O Messenger of Allah ﷺ, do tell us." Messenger of Allah ﷺ replied, "To ascribe a partner unto Allah. To disobey one's parents. To bare false witness, (or tell a lie). (The narrator is not sure which of the two Sayyidina Messenger of Allah ﷺ had said). At that time Messenger of Allah ﷺ was leaning on something. When he mentioned lies, he sat up, and because of its importance began to repeat it many times, till we began hoping that he would stop, and not repeat it so many times".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا حُمَيْدُ بْنُ مَسْعَدَةَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ الْمُفَضَّلِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الْجُرَيْرِيُّ، عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي بَكْرَةَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: أَلا أُحَدِّثُكُمْ بِأَكْبَرِ الْكَبَائِرِ؟ قَالُوا: بَلَى يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ قَالَ: الإِشْرَاكُ بِاللَّهِ، وَعُقُوقُ الْوَالِدَيْنِ قَالَ: وَجَلَسَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، وَكَانَ مُتَّكِئًا، قَالَ: وَشَهَادَةُ الزُّورِ، أَوْ قَوْلُ الزُّورِ، قَالَ: فَمَا زَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، يَقُولُهَا حَتَّى قُلْنَا: لَيْتَهُ سَكَتَ.
references: Book of The Pillow Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 124

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 125
englishRaw:
Abu Juhayafah (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I do not lean when I have meals.'"
narrator: Abu Juhayafah (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I do not lean when I have meals.'"
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا شَرِيكٌ، عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الأَقْمَرِ، عَنْ أَبِي جُحَيْفَةَ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: أَمَّا أَنَا، فَلا آكُلُ مُتَّكِئًا.
references: Book of The Pillow Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 125

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 126
englishRaw:
Jaabir bin Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "I had seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ lean on a pillow."
narrator: Jaabir bin Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "I had seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ lean on a pillow."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يُوسُفُ بْنُ عِيسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْرَائِيلُ، عَنْ سِمَاكِ بْنِ حَرْبٍ، عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ سَمُرَةَ، قَالَ: رَأَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ مُتَّكِئًا عَلَى وِسَادَةٍ،.
references: Book of The Pillow Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 126

error: Exception: HTTP 404

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 128
englishRaw: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that Messenger of Allah ﷺ became ill. For this reason he came out of his room With the support of Usaamah (may Allah be pleased with him), and led the Sahaaba in salaah. Messenger of Allah ﷺ wore a Yamaani printed shawl at that time.
body: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that Messenger of Allah ﷺ became ill. For this reason he came out of his room With the support of Usaamah (may Allah be pleased with him), and led the Sahaaba in salaah. Messenger of Allah ﷺ wore a Yamaani printed shawl at that time.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَاصِمٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ، عَنْ حُمَيْدٍ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ شَاكِيًا، فَخَرَجَ يَتَوَكَّأُ عَلَى أُسَامَةَ بْنِ زَيْدٍ وَعَلَيْهِ ثَوْبٌ قِطْرِيٌّ، قَدْ تَوَشَّحَ بِهِ فَصَلَّى بِهِمْ.
references: Book of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Leaning On Something Other Than a Pillow, Hadith 128

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 129
englishRaw:
Fadl bin 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "I came to Messenger of Allah ﷺ at the time of his last illness before he passed away. A yellow band was fastened around the mubaarak head of Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I greeted him and after replying, he asked me to fasten the band tightly around his mubaarak head. I carried out his request. Thereafter Messenger of Allah ﷺ sat up, then stood up supporting himself on my shoulder, and entered the masjid". There is a detailed-incident in this hadith.
narrator: Fadl bin 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "I came to Messenger of Allah ﷺ at the time of his last illness before he passed away. A yellow band was fastened around the mubaarak head of Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I greeted him and after replying, he asked me to fasten the band tightly around his mubaarak head. I carried out his request. Thereafter Messenger of Allah ﷺ sat up, then stood up supporting himself on my shoulder, and entered the masjid". There is a detailed-incident in this hadith.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُبَارَكِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَطَاءُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ الْخَفَّافُ الْحَلَبِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا جَعْفَرُ بْنُ بُرْقَانَ، عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ أَبِي رَبَاحٍ، عَنِ الْفَضْلِ بْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، فِي مَرَضِهِ الَّذِي تُوُفِّيَ فِيهِ، وَعَلَى رَأْسِهِ عِصَابَةٌ صَفْرَاءُ، فَسَلَّمْتُ عَلَيْهِ، فَقَالَ: يَا فَضْلُ قُلْتُ: لَبَّيْكَ يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ، قَالَ: اشْدُدْ بِهَذِهِ الْعِصَابَةِ رَأْسِي قَالَ: فَفَعَلْتُ، ثُمَّ قَعَدَ فَوَضَعَ كَفَّهُ عَلَى مَنْكِبِي، ثُمَّ قَامَ فَدَخَلَ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ.
references: Book of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Leaning On Something Other Than a Pillow, Hadith 129

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 130
englishRaw:
Kaa'b bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ licked his fingers thrice (after eating)".
narrator: Kaa'b bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ licked his fingers thrice (after eating)".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مَهْدِيٍّ، عَنْ سُفْيَانَ، عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، عَنِ ابْنٍ لِكَعْبِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ يَلْعَقُ أَصَابِعَهُ ثَلاثًا.
references: Book of Description Of The Eating Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 130

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 131
englishRaw:
Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
