                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lick his three fingers after having eaten".
narrator: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to lick his three fingers after having eaten".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْخَلالُ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَفَّانُ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ، عَنْ ثَابِتٍ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ إِذَا أَكَلَ طَعَامًا لَعِقَ أَصَابِعَهُ الثَّلاثَ.
references: Book of Description Of The Eating Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 131

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 132
englishRaw:
Abu Juhayfah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallain said: 'I do not lean and eat'".
narrator: Abu Juhayfah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallain said: 'I do not lean and eat'".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ يَزِيدَ الصُّدَائِيُّ الْبَغْدَادِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ يَعْنِي الْحَضْرَمِيَّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، عَنْ سُفْيَانَ الثَّوْرِيِّ، عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الأَقْمَرِ، عَنْ أَبِي جُحَيْفَةَ، قَالَ: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ: أَمَّا أَنَا فَلا آكُلُ مُتَّكِئًا.
references: Book of Description Of The Eating Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 132

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 133
englishRaw:
Ka'b bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "It was the noble habit of Messenger of Allah ﷺn to use three fingers whilst eating and-he also licked them".
narrator: Ka'b bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "It was the noble habit of Messenger of Allah ﷺn to use three fingers whilst eating and-he also licked them".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هَارُونُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ الْهَمْدَانِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدَةُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ، عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ، عَنِ ابْنٍ لِكَعْبِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، قَالَ: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يَأْكُلُ بِأَصَابِعِهِ، الثَّلاثِ وَيَلْعَقُهُنَّ.
references: Book of Description Of The Eating Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 133

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 134
englishRaw:
Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Dates were presented to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I saw him eating them. Due to hunger he was sitting on the support of something and not on his own support".
narrator: Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Dates were presented to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I saw him eating them. Due to hunger he was sitting on the support of something and not on his own support".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَنِيعٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الْفَضْلُ بْنُ دُكَيْنٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُصْعَبُ بْنُ سُلَيْمٍ، قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ أَنَسَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ، يَقُولُ: أُتِيَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ بِتَمْرٍ فَرَأَيْتُهُ يَأْكُلُ وَهُوَ مُقْعٍ مِنَ الْجُوعِ.
references: Book of Description Of The Eating Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 134

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 135
englishRaw:
'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
                      "Till the demise of Messenger of Allah sallallahu'Alayhi Wasallam, his family never ate a full stomach of bread made of barley for two consecutive days".
narrator: 'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
body: "Till the demise of Messenger of Allah sallallahu'Alayhi Wasallam, his family never ate a full stomach of bread made of barley for two consecutive days".
arabic: حدثني مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى، وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالا: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنَ يَزِيدَ، يُحَدِّثُ عَنِ الأَسْوَدِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ، أَنَّهَا قَالَتْ: مَا شَبِعَ آلُ مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ مِنْ خُبْزِ الشَّعِيرِ يَوْمَيْنِ مُتَتَابِعَيْنِ حَتَّى قُبِضَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ.
references: Book of The Bread Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 135

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 136
englishRaw:
Abu Umaamah Al-Baahili (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Bread made of barley was never left over in the house of Messenger of Allah ﷺ".
narrator: Abu Umaamah Al-Baahili (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Bread made of barley was never left over in the house of Messenger of Allah ﷺ".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبَّاسُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الدُّورِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ أَبِي بُكَيْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا حَرِيزُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ، عَنْ سُلَيْمِ بْنِ عَامِرٍ، قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا أُمَامَةَ الْبَاهِلِيَّ، يَقُولُ: مَا كَانَ يَفْضُلُ عَنِ أَهْلِ بَيْتِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ خُبْزُ الشَّعِيرِ.
references: Book of The Bread Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 136

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 137
englishRaw:
lbn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ and his family spent many consecutive nights without food, because there would be no supper. The bread of Messenger of Allah ﷺ was mostly made of barley". (Sometimes bread made of wheat was also available).
narrator: lbn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ and his family spent many consecutive nights without food, because there would be no supper. The bread of Messenger of Allah ﷺ was mostly made of barley". (Sometimes bread made of wheat was also available).
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ مُعَاوِيَةَ الْجُمَحِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا ثَابِتُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ، عَنْ هِلاَلِ بْنِ خَبَّابٍ، عَنْ عِكْرِمَةَ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، يَبِيتُ اللَّيَالِيَ الْمُتَتَابِعَةَ طَاوِيًا هُوَ وَأَهْلُهُ، لا يَجِدُونُ عِشَاءً وَكَانَ أَكْثَرُ خُبْزِهِمْ، خُبْزَ الشَّعِيرِ.
references: Book of The Bread Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 137

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 138
englishRaw:
Someone asked Sahl bin Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) "Did Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam ever eat bread made of white (fine) flour?" He replied:
                      White flour may not have come before Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam till his last days". The questioner then asked: "Did you people use sieved flour in the time of Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam?"
narrator: Someone asked Sahl bin Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) "Did Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam ever eat bread made of white (fine) flour?" He replied:
body: White flour may not have come before Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam till his last days". The questioner then asked: "Did you people use sieved flour in the time of Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam?"
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْمَجِيدِ الْحَنَفِيُّ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ دِينَارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو حَازِمٍ، عَنْ سَهْلِ بْنِ سَعْدٍ، أَنَّهُ قِيلَ لَهُ: أَكَلَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ النَّقِيَّ؟ يَعْنِي الْحُوَّارَى فَقَالَ سَهْلٌ: مَا رَأَى رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ النَّقِيَّ حَتَّى لَقِيَ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ تَعَالَى، فَقِيلَ لَهُ: هَلْ كَانَتْ لَكُمْ مَنَاخِلُ عَلَى عَهْدِ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ؟
references: Book of The Bread Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 138

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 139
englishRaw:
Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that... "Messenger of Allah ﷺ never ate food from a table, nor from small plates, nor was chapaati (a type of thin bread) ever made for him. Yunus (may Allah be pleased with him) says, I asked Qataadah:
                      'Then on what did Messenger of Allah ﷺ put and eat his food ?'. He replied: on this leather dastarkhaan'".
narrator: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports that... "Messenger of Allah ﷺ never ate food from a table, nor from small plates, nor was chapaati (a type of thin bread) ever made for him. Yunus (may Allah be pleased with him) says, I asked Qataadah:
body: 'Then on what did Messenger of Allah ﷺ put and eat his food ?'. He replied: on this leather dastarkhaan'".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاذُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي، عَنْ يُونُسَ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ: مَا أَكَلَ نَبِيُّ اللهِ عَلَى خِوَانٍ، وَلا فِي سُكُرَّجَةٍ، وَلا خُبِزَ لَهُ مُرَقَّقٌ قَالَ: فَقُلْتُ لِقَتَادَةَ: فَعَلامَ كَانُوا يَأْكُلُونَ؟ قَالَ: عَلَى هَذِهِ السُّفَرِ قَالَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ: يُونُسُ هَذَا الَّذِي رَوَى عَنْ قَتَادَةَ هُوَ يُونُسُ الإِسْكَافُ.
references: Book of The Bread Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 139

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 140
englishRaw:
Masruq says. "I went to 'Aisha ((may Allah be pleased with her)). She ordered' food for me and began saying 'I never eat a stomach-full but feel like crying, then I do cry'. Masruq asked:
                      'Why do you feel like crying?'. She replied: 'I remember that condition of Messenger of Allah ﷺ on which he left us for the next world. I swear by Allah that, he never filled his stomach twice in one day with meat or bread'".
narrator: Masruq says. "I went to 'Aisha ((may Allah be pleased with her)). She ordered' food for me and began saying 'I never eat a stomach-full but feel like crying, then I do cry'. Masruq asked:
body: 'Why do you feel like crying?'. She replied: 'I remember that condition of Messenger of Allah ﷺ on which he left us for the next world. I swear by Allah that, he never filled his stomach twice in one day with meat or bread'".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَنِيعٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبَّادُ بْنُ عَبَّادٍ الْمُهَلَّبِيُّ، عَنْ مُجَالِدٍ، عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ، عَنْ مَسْرُوقٍ، قَالَ: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى عَائِشَةَ، فَدَعَتْ لِي بِطَعَامٍ وَقَالَتْ: مَا أَشْبَعُ مِنْ طَعَامٍ فَأَشَاءُ أَنْ أَبْكِيَ إِلا بَكِيتُ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِمَ؟ قَالَتْ: أَذْكُرُ الْحَالَ الَّتِي فَارَقَ عَلَيْهَا رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ الدُّنْيَا، وَاللَّهِ مَا شَبِعَ مِنْ خُبْزٍ وَلَحْمٍ مَرَّتَيْنِ فِي يَوْمٍ.
references: Book of The Bread Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 140

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 141
englishRaw:
'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ never filled his stomach with bread made of barley for two consecutive days till he passed away".
narrator: 'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ never filled his stomach with bread made of barley for two consecutive days till he passed away".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو دَاوُدَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنَ يَزِيدَ يُحَدِّثُ، عَنِ الأَسْوَدِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ، قَالَتْ: مَا شَبِعَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ مِنْ خُبْزِ الشَّعِيرِ يَوْمَيْنِ مُتَتَابِعَيْنِ حَتَّى قُبِضَ.
references: Book of The Bread Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 141

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 142
englishRaw:
Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Till the end of his life Messenger of Allah ﷺ never ate on a table and never ate a chapaati".
narrator: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Till the end of his life Messenger of Allah ﷺ never ate on a table and never ate a chapaati".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَمْرٍو أَبُو مَعْمَرٍ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَارِثِ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي عَرُوبَةَ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ، قَالَ: مَا أَكَلَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ عَلَى خِوَانٍ، وَلا أَكَلَ خُبْزًا مُرَقَّقًا حَتَّى مَاتَ.
references: Book of The Bread Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 142

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 143
englishRaw:
'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ once said: 'What a nice condiment vinegar is'".
narrator: 'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ once said: 'What a nice condiment vinegar is'".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَهْلِ بْنِ عَسْكَرٍ، وَعَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، قَالا: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ حَسَّانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ بِلالٍ، عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ، أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، قَالَ: نِعْمَ الإِدَامُ الْخَلُّ، قَالَ عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، فِي حَدِيثِهِ: نِعْمَ الإِدَامُ أَوِ الأُدْمُ الْخَلُّ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 143

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 144
englishRaw:
Nu'maan bin Bashir (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Are you not in the luxuries of eating and drinking. Whereas I have seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ not having ordinary types of dates to full his stomach".
narrator: Nu'maan bin Bashir (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Are you not in the luxuries of eating and drinking. Whereas I have seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ not having ordinary types of dates to full his stomach".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الأَحْوَصِ، عَنْ سِمَاكِ بْنِ حَرْبٍ، قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ النُّعْمَانَ بْنَ بَشِيرٍ، يَقُولُ: أَلَسْتُمْ فِي طَعَامٍ وَشَرَابٍ مَا شِئِتُمْ؟ لَقَدْ رَأَيْتُ نَبِيَّكُمْ ﷺ، وَمَا يَجِدُ مِنَ الدَّقَلِ مَا يَمْلأُ بَطْنَهُ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 144

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 145
englishRaw:
Jaabir bin 'Abdullah may Allah be pleased with him relates that Rasullullah Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam said:
                      "What a wonderful curry vinegar is?".
narrator: Jaabir bin 'Abdullah may Allah be pleased with him relates that Rasullullah Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam said:
body: "What a wonderful curry vinegar is?".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدَةُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ الْخُزَاعِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ، عَنْ سُفْيَانَ، عَنْ مُحَارِبِ بْنِ دِثَارٍ، عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: نِعْمَ الإِدَامُ الأُدْمُ: الْخَلُّ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 145

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 146
englishRaw:
Zahdam Al-Jarmi RA.says that we were present in the assembly of abu Musa Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him). Fowl meat was served for food. A, person from among those present, moved back. Abu Musa Radiyalahu 'Anhu asked him the reason (for doing so). He replied 'I had seen the fowl eat something (dirty) so I swore an oath that I will not eat it'. Abu Musa (may Allah be pleased with him) said:
                      'In that case, I had seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ eat the meat of a fowl' (come and partake of it without fear. If it was not permissible or disliked, how did Messenger of Allah ﷺ eat it).
narrator: Zahdam Al-Jarmi RA.says that we were present in the assembly of abu Musa Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him). Fowl meat was served for food. A, person from among those present, moved back. Abu Musa Radiyalahu 'Anhu asked him the reason (for doing so). He replied 'I had seen the fowl eat something (dirty) so I swore an oath that I will not eat it'. Abu Musa (may Allah be pleased with him) said:
body: 'In that case, I had seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ eat the meat of a fowl' (come and partake of it without fear. If it was not permissible or disliked, how did Messenger of Allah ﷺ eat it).
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هَنَّادٌ، حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ سُفْيَانَ، عَنْ أَيُّوبَ، عَنْ أَبِي قِلابَةَ، عَنْ زَهْدَمٍ الْجَرْمِيِّ، قَالَ: كُنَّا عِنْدَ أَبِي مُوسَى الأَشْعَرِيِّ، فَأُتِيَ بِلَحْمِ دَجَاجٍ فَتَنَحَّى رَجُلٌ مِنَ الْقَوْمِ، فَقَالَ: مَا لَكَ؟ فَقَالَ: إِنِّي رَأَيْتُهَا تَأْكُلُ شَيْئًا فَحَلَفْتُ أَنْ لا آكُلَهَا.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 146

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 147
englishRaw:
Safeena (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "I ate the meat of Hubaa-raa with Messenger of Allah ﷺ".
narrator: Safeena (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "I ate the meat of Hubaa-raa with Messenger of Allah ﷺ".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا الْفَضْلُ بْنُ سَهْلٍ الأَعْرَجُ الْبَغْدَادِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ مَهْدِيٍّ، عَنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ عُمَرَ بْنِ سَفِينَةَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ جَدِّهِ، قَالَ: أَكَلْتُ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ لَحْمَ حُبَارَى.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 147

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 148
englishRaw:
Zahdam Al-Jarmi RA. says:
                      "We were present in the company of Abu Musa Ash'ari. Food was presented to him in which there was fowl meat also. Among those present was a person from the tribe of Banu Taymillah who was reddish in colour and seemed a freed slave. He moved back and sat on one side. Abu Musa asked him to come near (and partake of the food) and related to him that Messenger of Allah ﷺ also ate the meat of a fowl. He excused himself saying: 'I had seen it eating such a thing which makes me dislike eating it. For this reason I had sworn an oath that I shall not eat it'".
narrator: Zahdam Al-Jarmi RA. says:
body: "We were present in the company of Abu Musa Ash'ari. Food was presented to him in which there was fowl meat also. Among those present was a person from the tribe of Banu Taymillah who was reddish in colour and seemed a freed slave. He moved back and sat on one side. Abu Musa asked him to come near (and partake of the food) and related to him that Messenger of Allah ﷺ also ate the meat of a fowl. He excused himself saying: 'I had seen it eating such a thing which makes me dislike eating it. For this reason I had sworn an oath that I shall not eat it'".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، عَنْ أَيُّوبَ، عَنِ الْقَاسِمِ التَّمِيمِيِّ، عَنْ زَهْدَمٍ الْجَرْمِيِّ، قَالَ: كُنَّا عِنْدَ أَبِي مُوسَى الأَشْعَرِيِّ، قَالَ: فَقَدَّمَ طَعَامَهُ وَقَدَّمَ فِي طَعَامِهِ لَحْمَ دَجَاجٍ وَفِي الْقَوْمِ رَجُلٌ مِنْ بَنِي تَيْمِ اللهِ أَحْمَرُ كَأَنَّهُ مَوْلًى، قَالَ: فَلَمْ يَدْنُ فَقَالَ لَهُ أَبُو مُوسَى: ادْنُ، فَإِنِّي قَدْ رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ أَكَلَ مِنْهُ، فَقَالَ: إِنِّي رَأَيْتُهُ يَأْكُلُ شَيْئًا، فَقَذِرْتُهُ فَحَلَفْتُ أَنْ لا أَطْعَمَهُ أَبَدًا.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 148

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 149
englishRaw:
Abu Usayd (may Allah be pleased with him) says. "Rasululah ﷺ said:
                      'Use olive oil in eating and for rubbing (on the body), for it is from a mubaarak (blessed) tree"'.
narrator: Abu Usayd (may Allah be pleased with him) says. "Rasululah ﷺ said:
body: 'Use olive oil in eating and for rubbing (on the body), for it is from a mubaarak (blessed) tree"'.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أَحْمَدَ الزُّبَيْرِيُّ، وَأَبُو نُعَيْمٍ، قَالا: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عِيسَى، عَنْ رَجُلٍ مِنْ أَهْلِ الشَّامِ، يُقَالُ: لَهُ عَطَاءٌ، عَنْ أَبِي أَسِيدٍ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: كُلُوا الزَّيْتَ، وَادَّهِنُوا بِهِ، فَإِنَّهُ مِنْ شَجَرَةٍ مُبَارَكَةٍ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 149

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 150
englishRaw:
It is related from 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that Messenger of Allah Sallallahu Aayhi Wasallam said:
                      "Use olive oil in cooking and rubbing (on the body) because it is from a mubaarak tree".
narrator: It is related from 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that Messenger of Allah Sallallahu Aayhi Wasallam said:
body: "Use olive oil in cooking and rubbing (on the body) because it is from a mubaarak tree".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ مُوسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَعْمَرٌ، عَنْ زَيْدِ بْنِ أَسْلَمَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: كُلُوا الزَّيْتَ وَادَّهِنُوا بِهِ، فَإِنَّهُ مِنْ شَجَرَةٍ مُبَارَكَةٍ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 150

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 151
englishRaw:
Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved gourd (dubbaa-dodhi-kadu). Once food - was presented to Messenger of Allah ﷺ or he attended an invitation. (The narrator doubts on which occasion this took place) where gourd was served. I knew Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved it. I searched for pieces from the curry and presented it to him".
narrator: Anas bin Maalik (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved gourd (dubbaa-dodhi-kadu). Once food - was presented to Messenger of Allah ﷺ or he attended an invitation. (The narrator doubts on which occasion this took place) where gourd was served. I knew Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved it. I searched for pieces from the curry and presented it to him".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ، وَعَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ مَهْدِيٍّ، قَالا: حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ يُعْجِبُهُ الدُّبَّاءُ فَأُتِيَ بِطَعَامٍ، أَوْ دُعِيَ لَهُ فَجَعَلْتُ أَتَتَبَّعُهُ، فَأَضَعُهُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ لِمَا أَعْلَمُ أَنَّهُ يُحِبُّهُ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 151

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 152
englishRaw:
Jaabir bin Taariq (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "I attended the assembly of Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I observed, they were busy cutting a gourd into pieces. I inquired: 'What shall be made of this'. He replied: 'It will add to our food'".
narrator: Jaabir bin Taariq (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "I attended the assembly of Messenger of Allah ﷺ. I observed, they were busy cutting a gourd into pieces. I inquired: 'What shall be made of this'. He replied: 'It will add to our food'".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا حَفْصُ بْنُ غِيَاثٍ، عَنْ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنُ أَبِي خَالِدٍ، عَنْ حَكِيمِ بْنِ جَابِرٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، قَالَ: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ﷺ، فَرَأَيْتُ عِنْدَهُ دُبَّاءً يُقَطَّعُ، فَقُلْتُ: مَا هَذَا؟ قَالَ: نُكَثِّرُ بِهِ طَعَامَنَا.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 152

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 153
englishRaw:
Anas bin. Maaik Radiyalahu 'Anhu says:
                      "A tailor once invited Rasululluh Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam. I also attended the invitation with Rasululluh Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam. He served Rasululluh Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam bread made of barley, and gravy with meat and gourd (dubba-dodhi) in it. I saw Rasululluh Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam look for pieces of gourd from all sides of the plate. From that time I also began loving gourd".
narrator: Anas bin. Maaik Radiyalahu 'Anhu says:
body: "A tailor once invited Rasululluh Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam. I also attended the invitation with Rasululluh Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam. He served Rasululluh Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam bread made of barley, and gravy with meat and gourd (dubba-dodhi) in it. I saw Rasululluh Sallallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam look for pieces of gourd from all sides of the plate. From that time I also began loving gourd".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ أَنَسٍ، عَنِ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ أَبِي طَلْحَةَ، أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ أَنَسَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ، يَقُولُ: إِنَّ خَيَّاطًا دَعَا رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، لِطَعَامٍ صَنَعَهُ، قَالَ أَنَسٌ: فَذَهَبْتُ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، إِلَى ذَلِكَ الطَّعَامِ، فَقَرَّبَ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ خُبْزًا مِنْ شَعِيرٍ، وَمَرَقًا فِيهِ دُبَّاءٌ وَقَدِيدٌ، قَالَ أَنَسُ: فَرَأَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ يَتَتَبَّعُ الدُّبَّاءَ حَوَالَيِ الْقَصْعَةِ فَلَمْ أَزَلْ أُحِبُّ الدُّبَّاءَ مِنْ يَوْمِئِذٍ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 153

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 154
englishRaw:
'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah SaIlallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam loved halwa and honey".
narrator: 'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah SaIlallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam loved halwa and honey".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ الدَّوْرَقِيُّ، وَسَلَمَةُ بْنُ شَبِيبٍ، وَمَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالُوا: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ، عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ، قَالَتْ: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ يُحِبُّ الْحَلْوَاءَ وَالْعَسَلَ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 154

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 155
englishRaw: Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) says "I presented a roasted side portion of meat to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He ate it and (thereafter) performed salaah, without performing wudu".
body: Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) says "I presented a roasted side portion of meat to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He ate it and (thereafter) performed salaah, without performing wudu".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الزَّعْفَرَانِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الْحَجَّاجُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ، قَالَ: قَالَ ابْنُ جُرَيْجٍ: أَخْبَرَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يُوسُفَ، أَنَّ عَطَاءَ بْنَ يَسَارٍ أَخْبَرَهُ، أَنَّ أُمَّ سَلَمَةَ أَخْبَرَتْهُ، أَنَّهَا قَرَّبَتْ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، جَنْبًا مَشْوِيًّا، فَأَكَلَ مِنْهُ، ثُمَّ قَامَ إِلَى الصَّلاةِ، وَمَا تَوَضَّأَ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 155

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 156
englishRaw: Abdullah bin Haarith (may Allah be pleased with him) says... "We ate roasted meat with Messenger of Allah ﷺ in the masjid".
body: Abdullah bin Haarith (may Allah be pleased with him) says... "We ate roasted meat with Messenger of Allah ﷺ in the masjid".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ لَهِيعَةَ، عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ بْنِ زِيَادٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ الْحَارِثِ، قَالَ: أَكَلْنَا مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ شِوَاءً فِي الْمَسْجِدِ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 156

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 157
englishRaw:
Mughirah bin Shu'bah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "One night I became a guest with Messenger of Allah ﷺ. At the time of meals a roasted side portion of meat was served. Messenger of Allah ﷺ cut pieces from it and gave me to eat. During this period Bilaal came and called out the adhaan. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'May his both hands be in dust. What made him call out the adhaan now'. He put down the knife and went for salaah". Mughirah (may Allah be pleased with him) says "(Another thing that happened) that my moustache had grown long. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Come let me put a miswaak on it and trim it', or said, 'Put a miswaak on it and trim it'. (One of the narrators are in doubt as to which of the two Messenger of Allah ﷺ had said).
narrator: Mughirah bin Shu'bah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "One night I became a guest with Messenger of Allah ﷺ. At the time of meals a roasted side portion of meat was served. Messenger of Allah ﷺ cut pieces from it and gave me to eat. During this period Bilaal came and called out the adhaan. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'May his both hands be in dust. What made him call out the adhaan now'. He put down the knife and went for salaah". Mughirah (may Allah be pleased with him) says "(Another thing that happened) that my moustache had grown long. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Come let me put a miswaak on it and trim it', or said, 'Put a miswaak on it and trim it'. (One of the narrators are in doubt as to which of the two Messenger of Allah ﷺ had said).
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مِسْعَرٌ، عَنْ أَبِي صَخْرَةَ جَامِعِ بْنِ شَدَّادٍ، عَنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ، عَنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ بْنِ شُعْبَةَ، قَالَ: ضِفْتُ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ ذَاتَ لَيْلَةٍ، فَأُتِيَ بِجَنْبٍ مَشْوِيٍّ، ثُمَّ أَخَذَ الشَّفْرَةَ فَجَعَلَ يَحُزُّ، فَحَزَّ لِي بِهَا مِنْهُ، قَالَ: فَجَاءَ بِلالٌ يُؤْذِنُهُ بِالصَّلاةِ فَأَلْقَى الشَّفْرَةَ، فَقَالَ: مَا لَهُ تَرِبَتْ يَدَاهُ؟، قَالَ: وَكَانَ شَارِبُهُ قَدْ وَفَى، فَقَالَ لَهُ: أَقُصُّهُ لَكَ عَلَى سِوَاكٍ أَوْ قُصُّهُ عَلَى سِوَاكٍ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 157

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 158
englishRaw:
Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Meat was sent to Messenger of Allah ﷺ from someone. From it the forequarter was presented to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He loved this portion (of the meat too). Messenger of Allah ﷺ tore the meat with his teeth and ate it". (He did not use a knife to cut it).
narrator: Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Meat was sent to Messenger of Allah ﷺ from someone. From it the forequarter was presented to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He loved this portion (of the meat too). Messenger of Allah ﷺ tore the meat with his teeth and ate it". (He did not use a knife to cut it).
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا وَاصِلُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الأَعْلَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ فُضَيْلٍ، عَنْ أَبِي حَيَّانَ التَّيْمِيِّ، عَنْ أَبِي زُرْعَةَ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، قَالَ: أُتِيَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ بِلَحْمٍ، فَرُفِعَ إِلَيْهِ الذِّرَاعُ، وَكَانَتْ تُعْجِبُهُ، فَنَهَسَ مِنْهَا.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 158

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 159
englishRaw:
Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved the meat of the forequarter. Messenger of Allah ﷺ was-given poison in the dhiraa portion of the meat. It is suspected that the Jews poisoned him'.
narrator: Ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved the meat of the forequarter. Messenger of Allah ﷺ was-given poison in the dhiraa portion of the meat. It is suspected that the Jews poisoned him'.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو دَاوُدَ، عَنْ زُهَيْرٍ يَعْنِي ابْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ، عَنِ أَبِي إِسْحَاقَ، عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ عِيَاضٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ مَسْعُودٍ، قَالَ: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ يُعْجِبُهُ الذِّرَاعُ، قَالَ: وَسُمَّ فِي الذِّرَاعِ، وَكَانَ يَرَى أَنَّ الْيَهُودَ سَمُّوهُ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 159

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 160
englishRaw:
Abu 'Ubayd (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "I cooked a pot (food) for Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Because Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved the dhiraa (forequarter of a goat or sheep) a lot, I served him that portion. He then ordered another one, I served the ,second one. He then ordered one again. I replied: 'Ya Messenger of Allah ﷺ the goat has only two dhiraa'. Messenger of Allah ﷺ then said: 'I swear an oath by the Name of that Being in whose hands is my life, if you kept quiet, you could have served me every time I requested one'".
narrator: Abu 'Ubayd (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "I cooked a pot (food) for Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Because Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved the dhiraa (forequarter of a goat or sheep) a lot, I served him that portion. He then ordered another one, I served the ,second one. He then ordered one again. I replied: 'Ya Messenger of Allah ﷺ the goat has only two dhiraa'. Messenger of Allah ﷺ then said: 'I swear an oath by the Name of that Being in whose hands is my life, if you kept quiet, you could have served me every time I requested one'".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُسْلِمُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبَانُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ، عَنْ قَتَادَةَ، عَنْ شَهْرِ بْنِ حَوْشَبٍ، عَنْ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ، قَالَ: طَبَخْتُ لِلنَّبِيِّ ﷺ، قِدْرًا، وَقَدْ كَانَ يُعْجِبُهُ الذِّرَاعُ، فَنَاوَلْتُهُ الذِّرَاعَ، ثُمَّ قَالَ: نَاوِلْنِي الذِّرَاعَ، فَنَاوَلْتُهُ، ثُمَّ قَالَ: نَاوِلْنِي الذِّرَاعَ، فَقُلْتُ: يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ، وَكَمْ لِلشَّاةِ مِنْ ذِرَاعٍ، فَقَالَ: وَالَّذِي نَفْسِي بِيَدِهِ لَوْ سَكَتَّ لَنَاوَلْتَنِي الذِّرَاعَ مَا دَعَوْتُ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 160

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 161
englishRaw:
'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ liked the dhiraa portion of meat not because of its tastiness, but because meat was only available occasionally, and this portion the meat cooked quickly. Messenger of Allah ﷺ also liked it as it saved time and he could return quickly to his commitments".
narrator: 'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ liked the dhiraa portion of meat not because of its tastiness, but because meat was only available occasionally, and this portion the meat cooked quickly. Messenger of Allah ﷺ also liked it as it saved time and he could return quickly to his commitments".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الزَّعْفَرَانِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ عَبَّادٍ، عَنْ فُلَيْحِ بْنِ سُلَيْمَانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي رَجُلٌ، مِنْ بَنِي عَبَّادٍ يُقَالَ لَهُ: عَبْدُ الْوَهَّابِ بْنُ يَحْيَى بْنُ عَبَّادٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ الزُّبَيْرِ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ، قَالَتْ: مَا كَانَتِ الذِّرَاعُ أَحَبَّ اللَّحْمِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، وَلَكِنَّهُ كَانَ لا يَجِدُ اللَّحْمَ إِلا غِبًّا، وَكَانَ يَعْجَلُ إِلَيْهَا، لأَنَّهَا أَعْجَلُهَا نُضْجًا.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 161

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 162
englishRaw:
Abdullah bin, Ja'far (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The best meat is that of the back portion."
narrator: Abdullah bin, Ja'far (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "The best meat is that of the back portion."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أَحْمَدَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مِسْعَرٌ، قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ شَيْخًا، مِنْ فَهْمٍ، قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ اللهِ بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ، يَقُولُ: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، يَقُولُ: إِنَّ أَطْيَبَ اللَّحْمِ لَحْمُ الظَّهْرِ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 162

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 163
englishRaw: 'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says that Messenger of Allah ﷺ said. "Vinegar is an excellent curry".
body: 'Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says that Messenger of Allah ﷺ said. "Vinegar is an excellent curry".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ بْنُ وَكِيعٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا زَيْدُ بْنُ الْحُبَابِ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ الْمَؤَمَّلِ، عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي مُلَيْكَةَ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، قَالَ: نِعْمَ الإِدَامُ الْخَلُّ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 163

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 164
englishRaw: Umme Haani radiyallahu anha (a cousin of Sayyidina Messenger of Allah ﷺ) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to me (to my house at the time when Makkah was conquered) and asked if there was something to eat. I replied, "Nothing besides dry bread and vinegar." Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Bring it. That house is not without a curry which has vinegar in it."
body: Umme Haani radiyallahu anha (a cousin of Sayyidina Messenger of Allah ﷺ) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to me (to my house at the time when Makkah was conquered) and asked if there was something to eat. I replied, "Nothing besides dry bread and vinegar." Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "Bring it. That house is not without a curry which has vinegar in it."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو كُرَيْبٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْعَلاءِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ عَيَّاشٍ، عَنْ ثَابِتٍ أَبِي حَمْزَةَ الثُّمَالِيِّ، عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ، عَنْ أُمِّ هَانِئِ، قَالَتْ: دَخَلَ عَلَيَّ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ، فَقَالَ: أَعِنْدَكِ شَيْءٌ؟ فَقُلْتُ: لا، إِلا خُبْزٌ يَابِسٌ، وَخَلٌّ فَقَالَ: هَاتِي، مَا أَقْفَرَ بَيْتٌ مِنْ أُدُمٍ فِيهِ الخل.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 164

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 165
englishRaw: Abu Musa Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) says that Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, The virtues of Aishah (radiyallahu anha) over other women is the same as the virtue of thareed over other foods.
body: Abu Musa Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) says that Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, The virtues of Aishah (radiyallahu anha) over other women is the same as the virtue of thareed over other foods.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ، عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ مُرَّةَ، عَنْ مُرَّةَ الْهَمْدَانِيِّ، عَنْ أَبِي مُوسَى الأَشْعَرِيِّ، عَنِ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ، قَالَ: فَضْلُ عَائِشَةَ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ كَفَضْلِ الثَّرِيدِ عَلَى سَائِرِ الطَّعَامِ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 165

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 166
englishRaw: Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The virtue and excellence of Aishah over all other women is like the excellence of thareed over other foods."
body: Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "The virtue and excellence of Aishah over all other women is like the excellence of thareed over other foods."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ مَعْمَرٍ الأَنْصَارِيُّ أَبُو طُوَالَةَ، أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ أَنَسَ بْنَ مَالِكٍ، يَقُولُ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: فَضْلُ عَائِشَةَ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ كَفَضْلِ الثَّرِيدِ عَلَى سَائِرِ الطَّعَامِ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 166

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 167
englishRaw: Abu Hurairah radiyallahu anha says that he once saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ eat a piece of cheese then perform wudhu. Then he saw him at another time eat a shoulder of a goat, and perform salaah without performing wudhu.
body: Abu Hurairah radiyallahu anha says that he once saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ eat a piece of cheese then perform wudhu. Then he saw him at another time eat a shoulder of a goat, and perform salaah without performing wudhu.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ، عَنْ سُهَيْلِ بْنِ أَبِي صَالِحٍ، عَنِ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، أَنَّهُ رَأَى رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، تَوَضَّأَ مِنْ أَكْلِ ثَوْرِ أَقِطٍ، ثُمَّ رَآهُ أَكَلَ مِنْ كَتِفِ شَاةٍ، ثُمَّ صَلَّى، وَلَمْ يَتَوَضَّأْ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 167

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 168
englishRaw: Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, Messenger of Allah ﷺ celebrated the waleemah of Safiyyah radiyallahu anha with dates and saweeq (sattu).
body: Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, Messenger of Allah ﷺ celebrated the waleemah of Safiyyah radiyallahu anha with dates and saweeq (sattu).
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عُمَرَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ، عَنْ وَائِلِ بْنِ دَاوُدَ، عَنِ ابْنِهِ، وَهُوَ بَكْرُ بْنُ وَائِلٍ، عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ: أَوْلَمَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ عَلَى صَفِيَّةَ بِتَمْرٍ وَسَوِيقٍ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 168

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 169
englishRaw: Salma radiyallahu anha says that Hasan, Abdullah ibn Abbas and Abdullah ibn Ja'far Sadiq (may Allah be pleased with him)m came to her and said, Cook for us the food that Messenger of Allah ﷺ liked and ate with pleasure. She replied, O my children, you will not like it now. (It was only liked in times of hardships.) They replied, Of course, we will surely like it. She got up and took a bit of barley, (crushed it) and put it in a pot, and poured a little olive oil over it, then crushed some chillies and spices and added it to the pot and served it, saying, This is what Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved (and ate with pleasure).
body: Salma radiyallahu anha says that Hasan, Abdullah ibn Abbas and Abdullah ibn Ja'far Sadiq (may Allah be pleased with him)m came to her and said, Cook for us the food that Messenger of Allah ﷺ liked and ate with pleasure. She replied, O my children, you will not like it now. (It was only liked in times of hardships.) They replied, Of course, we will surely like it. She got up and took a bit of barley, (crushed it) and put it in a pot, and poured a little olive oil over it, then crushed some chillies and spices and added it to the pot and served it, saying, This is what Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved (and ate with pleasure).
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْبَصْرِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا الْفُضَيْلُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي فَائِدٌ، مَوْلَى عُبَيْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ أَبِي رَافِعٍ مَوْلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي عُبَيْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ، عَنْ جَدَّتِهِ سَلْمَى، أَنَّ الْحَسَنَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ، وَابْنَ عَبَّاسٍ، وَابْنَ جَعْفَرٍ أَتَوْهَا فَقَالُوا لَهَا: اصْنَعِي لَنَا طَعَامًا مِمَّا كَانَ يُعْجِبُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، وَيُحْسِنُ أَكْلَهُ فَقَالَتْ: يَا بُنَيَّ لا تَشْتَهِيهِ الْيَوْمَ، قَالَ: بَلَى اصْنَعِيهِ لَنَا قَالَ: فَقَامَتْ فَأَخَذَتْ مِنْ شَعِيرٍ فَطَحَنَتْهُ، ثُمَّ جَعَلَتْهُ فِي قِدْرٍ، وَصَبَّتْ عَلَيْهِ شَيْئًا مِنْ زَيْتٍ، وَدَقَّتِ الْفُلْفُلَ، وَالتَّوَابِلَ، فَقَرَّبَتْهُ إِلَيْهِمْ، فَقَالَتْ: هَذَا مِمَّا كَانَ يُعْجِبُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، وَيُحْسِنُ أَكْلَهُ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 169

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 170
englishRaw: Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to our house. We slaughtered a goat in his honour. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "It is as if they knew we adore meat." (Imam Tirmizi says, This hadith has a long incident, of which a portion is mentioned briefly here.)
body: Jabir ibn Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to our house. We slaughtered a goat in his honour. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, "It is as if they knew we adore meat." (Imam Tirmizi says, This hadith has a long incident, of which a portion is mentioned briefly here.)
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أَحْمَدَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنِ الأَسْوَدِ بْنِ قَيْسٍ، عَنْ نُبَيْحٍ الْعَنَزِيِّ، عَنْ جَابِرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ، قَالَ: أَتَانَا النَّبِيُّ ﷺ، فِي مَنْزِلِنَا، فَذَبَحْنَا لَهُ شَاةً، فَقَالَ: كَأَنَّهُمْ عَلِمُوا أَنَّا نُحِبُّ اللَّحْمَ وَفِي الْحَدِيثِ قِصَّةٌ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 170

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 171
englishRaw: Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ once went to the house of a woman from among the Ansaar. I also accompanied him. The hostess slaughtered a goat for Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He ate some meat from it. She then served a tray of fresh dates. Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate some from it also. He then performed wudhu for Zuhr and performed the Zuhr salaah. After returning from the salaah she served from the remaining meat. Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate from it. He did not perform wudhu for the Asr salaah (and performed salaah with the previous wudhu).
body: Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ once went to the house of a woman from among the Ansaar. I also accompanied him. The hostess slaughtered a goat for Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He ate some meat from it. She then served a tray of fresh dates. Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate some from it also. He then performed wudhu for Zuhr and performed the Zuhr salaah. After returning from the salaah she served from the remaining meat. Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate from it. He did not perform wudhu for the Asr salaah (and performed salaah with the previous wudhu).
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عُمَرَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَقِيلٍ، أَنَّهُ سمعَ جَابِرًا (ح) قَالَ سُفْيَانُ: وَحَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُنْكَدِرِ، عَنْ جَابِرٍ، قَالَ: خَرَجَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، وَأَنَا مَعَهُ فَدَخَلَ عَلَى امْرَأَةٍ مِنَ الأَنْصَارِ، فذَبَحَتْ لَهُ شَاةً، فَأَكَلَ مِنْهَا، وَأَتَتْهُ بِقِنَاعٍ مِنْ رُطَبٍ، فَأَكَلَ مِنْهُ، ثُمَّ تَوَضَّأَ لِلظُّهْرِ، وَصَلَّى، ﷺ، ثُمَّ انْصَرَفَ، فَأَتَتْهُ بِعُلالَةٍ مِنْ عُلالَةِ الشَّاةِ، فَأَكَلَ ثُمَّ صَلَّى الْعَصْرَ، وَلَمْ يَتَوَضَّأْ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 171

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 172
englishRaw: Umme Munzir radiyallahu anha says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ visited me. Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) was with him. We had some bunches of dates hanging. Messenger of Allah ﷺ began eating from them. Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) also began eating with him. Messenger of Allah ﷺ stopped him saying, "You have just recovered from your illness and should not eat this." He (Ali (may Allah be pleased with him)) stopped and Messenger of Allah ﷺ continued eating. Umme Munzir radiyallahu anha says, I then cooked some barley and beetroot. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to Ali (may Allah be pleased with him), "Eat this, it is suitable for you."
body: Umme Munzir radiyallahu anha says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ visited me. Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) was with him. We had some bunches of dates hanging. Messenger of Allah ﷺ began eating from them. Ali (may Allah be pleased with him) also began eating with him. Messenger of Allah ﷺ stopped him saying, "You have just recovered from your illness and should not eat this." He (Ali (may Allah be pleased with him)) stopped and Messenger of Allah ﷺ continued eating. Umme Munzir radiyallahu anha says, I then cooked some barley and beetroot. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to Ali (may Allah be pleased with him), "Eat this, it is suitable for you."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا الْعَبَّاسُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الدُّورِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يُونُسُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا فُلَيْحُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ، عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، عَنْ يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ أَبِي يَعْقُوبَ، عَنْ أُمِّ الْمُنْذِرِ، قَالَتْ: دَخَلَ عَلَيَّ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، وَمَعَهُ عَلِيٌّ، وَلَنَا دَوَالٍ مُعَلَّقَةٌ، قَالَتْ: فَجَعَلَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ يَأْكُلُ وَعَلِيٌّ مَعَهُ يَأْكُلُ، فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، لِعَلِيٍّ: مَهْ يَا عَلِيُّ، فَإِنَّكَ نَاقَةٌ، قَالَتْ: فَجَلَسَ عَلِيٌّ، وَالنَّبِيُّ ﷺ يَأْكُلُ، قَالَتْ: فَجَعَلْتُ لَهُمْ سِلْقًا وَشَعِيرًا، فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ لِعَلِيٍّ: مِنْ هَذَا فَأَصِبْ فَإِنَّ هَذَا أَوْفَقُ لَكَ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 172

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 173
englishRaw: Ummul Mu'mineen Aishah radiyallahu anha says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to come to me and ask if there was any food available. When I would say, "No," he would say, "I have intended to fast." Once when Messenger of Allah ﷺ came and enquired, I replied, ‘We have received a present.’   Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked, ‘What is it?’   I replied, ‘Malidah (a type of cake made of dates, ghee, cheese or flour).’   He said, ‘I had made an intention of fasting already.’ He then ate some from it.
body: Ummul Mu'mineen Aishah radiyallahu anha says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to come to me and ask if there was any food available. When I would say, "No," he would say, "I have intended to fast." Once when Messenger of Allah ﷺ came and enquired, I replied, ‘We have received a present.’   Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked, ‘What is it?’   I replied, ‘Malidah (a type of cake made of dates, ghee, cheese or flour).’   He said, ‘I had made an intention of fasting already.’ He then ate some from it.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ السَّرِيِّ، عَنْ سُفْيَانَ، عَنْ طَلْحَةَ بْنِ يَحْيَى، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ بِنْتِ طَلْحَةَ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ، أُمِّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ، قَالَتْ: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ يَأْتِينِي فَيَقُولُ: أَعِنْدَكِ غَدَاءٌ؟ فَأَقُولُ: لا قَالَتْ: فَيَقُولُ: إِنِّي صَائِمٌ قَالَتْ: فَأَتَانِي يَوْمًا، فَقُلْتُ: يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ، إِنَّهُ أُهْدِيَتْ لَنَا هَدِيَّةٌ، قَالَ: وَمَا هِيَ؟ قُلْتُ: حَيْسٌ، قَالَ: أَمَا إِنِّي أَصْبَحْتُ صَائِمًا، قَالَتْ: ثُمَّ أَكَلَ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 173

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 174
englishRaw: Yusuf ibn Abdullah ibn Salaam says, I once observed Messenger of Allah ﷺ take a piece of bread and put a date on it and say, "This (date) is the curry for this (bread)." He then ate it.
body: Yusuf ibn Abdullah ibn Salaam says, I once observed Messenger of Allah ﷺ take a piece of bread and put a date on it and say, "This (date) is the curry for this (bread)." He then ate it.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عُمَرُ بْنُ حَفْصِ بْنِ غِيَاثٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي، عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي يَحْيَى الأَسْلَمِيِّ، عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ أَبِي أُمَيَّةَ الأَعْوَرِ، عَنْ يُوسُفَ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ سَلامٍ، قَالَ: رَأَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ أَخَذَ كِسْرَةً مِنْ خُبْزِ الشَّعِيرِ فَوَضَعَ عَلَيْهَا تَمْرَةً وَقَالَ: هَذِهِ إِدَامُ هَذِهِ، وأكل.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 174

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 175
englishRaw: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ liked to eat the remains (known as "powpra" in Gujarati).
body: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ liked to eat the remains (known as "powpra" in Gujarati).
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ، عَنْ عَبَّادِ بْنِ الْعَوَّامِ، عَنْ حُمَيْدٍ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ: أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ كَانَ يُعْجِبُهُ الثُّفْلُ، قَالَ عَبْدُ اللهِ: يَعْنِي مَا بَقِيَ مِنَ الطَّعَامِ.
references: Book of Description Of The Curry Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 175

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 176
englishRaw:
Ibn'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "Once when Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam came out of the toilet, after relieving himself from the call of nature, food was served to him. They asked if water for wudu should be brought? He replied: 'I have been commanded to perform wudu when 1 perform salaah'".
narrator: Ibn'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "Once when Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam came out of the toilet, after relieving himself from the call of nature, food was served to him. They asked if water for wudu should be brought? He replied: 'I have been commanded to perform wudu when 1 perform salaah'".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَنِيعٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، عَنْ أَيُّوبَ، عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي مُلَيْكَةَ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ خَرَجَ مِنَ الْخَلاءِ، فَقُرِّبَ إِلَيْهِ الطَّعَامُ، فَقَالُوا: أَلا نَأْتِيكَ بِوَضُوءٍ؟ قَالَ: إِنَّمَا أُمِرْتُ بِالْوُضُوءِ، إِذَا قُمْتُ إِلَى الصَّلاةِ.
references: Book of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Performing Wudu At The Time Of Eating, Hadith 176

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 177
englishRaw:
Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) relates:
                      "Messenger of Allah ﷺ once, after relieving himself in the toilet, came out, and was served food. The Sahaabah inquired: 'Will you not perform wudu?'. Messenger of Allah Saliallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam replied: 'Do I have to perform salaah, that wudu must be performed?'"
narrator: Ibn 'Abbaas (may Allah be pleased with him) relates:
body: "Messenger of Allah ﷺ once, after relieving himself in the toilet, came out, and was served food. The Sahaabah inquired: 'Will you not perform wudu?'. Messenger of Allah Saliallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam replied: 'Do I have to perform salaah, that wudu must be performed?'"
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ الْمَخْزُومِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ بْنُ عُيَيْنَةَ، عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ دِينَارٍ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ الْحُوَيْرِثِ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ: خَرَجَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ مِنَ الْغَائِطِ فَأُتِيَ بِطَعَامٍ، فَقِيلَ لَهُ: أَلا تَتَوَضَّأُ؟ فَقَالَ: أَأُصَلِّي، فَأَتَوَضَّأُ.
references: Book of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Performing Wudu At The Time Of Eating, Hadith 177

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 178
englishRaw:
Salmaan Faarisi (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "I have read in-the Tauraah, that performing wudu (washing the hands) after eating increases blessings. I mentioned this to Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Wudu before and after eating (washing the hands and mouth) increases blessings."
narrator: Salmaan Faarisi (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body: "I have read in-the Tauraah, that performing wudu (washing the hands) after eating increases blessings. I mentioned this to Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Wudu before and after eating (washing the hands and mouth) increases blessings."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ مُوسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ نُمَيْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا قَيْسُ بْنُ الرَّبِيعِ (ح) وَحَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْكَرِيمِ الْجُرْجَانِيُّ، عَنْ قَيْسِ بْنِ الرَّبِيعِ، عَنْ أَبِي هَاشِمٍ، عَنْ زَاذَانَ، عَنْ سَلْمَانَ، قَالَ: قَرَأْتُ فِي التَّوْرَاةِ، أَنَّ بَرَكَةَ الطَّعَامِ الْوُضُوءُ بَعْدَهُ، فَذَكَرْتُ ذَلِكَ لِلنَّبِيِّ ﷺ، وَأَخْبَرْتُهُ بِمَا قَرَأْتُ فِي التَّوْرَاةِ، فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: بَرَكَةُ الطَّعَامِ الْوُضُوءُ قَبْلَهُ، وَالْوُضُوءُ بَعْدَهُ.
references: Book of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Performing Wudu At The Time Of Eating, Hadith 178

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 179
englishRaw:
Abu Ayyub Ansaari (may Allah be pleased with him) reports:
                      "We were once present in the assembly of Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Food was brought to him. 1 did not observe any food that had so much barakah at the beginning and at the end of which there was no barakah left in the food. We therefore asked Messenger of Allah ﷺ reason?. He replied: 'In the beginning we all recited 'Bismillah' before we began eating. Then someone in the end joined us, and did not recite ''Bismillah'. The shaitaan ate with him'".
narrator: Abu Ayyub Ansaari (may Allah be pleased with him) reports:
body: "We were once present in the assembly of Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Food was brought to him. 1 did not observe any food that had so much barakah at the beginning and at the end of which there was no barakah left in the food. We therefore asked Messenger of Allah ﷺ reason?. He replied: 'In the beginning we all recited 'Bismillah' before we began eating. Then someone in the end joined us, and did not recite ''Bismillah'. The shaitaan ate with him'".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ لَهِيعَةَ، عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ أَبِي حَبِيبٍ، عَنْ رَاشِدِ بْنِ جَنْدَلٍ الْيَافِعِيِّ، عَنْ حَبِيبِ بْنِ أَوْسٍ، عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ الأَنْصَارِيِّ، قَالَ: كُنَّا عِنْدَ النَّبِيِّ ﷺ، يَوْمًا، فَقَرَّبَ طَعَامًا، فَلَمْ أَرَ طَعَامًا كَانَ أَعْظَمَ بَرَكَةً مِنْهُ، أَوَّلَ مَا أَكَلْنَا، وَلا أَقَلَّ بَرَكَةً فِي آخِرِهِ، قُلْنَا: يَا رَسُولَ اللهِ، كَيْفَ هَذَا؟ قَالَ: إِنَّا ذَكَرْنَا اسْمَ اللهِ حِينَ أَكَلْنَا، ثُمَّ قَعَدَ مَنْ أَكَلَ وَلَمْ يُسَمِّ اللَّهَ تَعَالَى فَأَكَلَ مَعَهُ الشَّيْطَانُ.
references: Book of The Words That Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Said Before and After Eating, Hadith 179

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 180
englishRaw:
Aisha radiyallahu 'Anha says:
                      "Messenger of Allah Sallallahli 'Alayi Wasallam said: 'When one eats and has forgotten to recite 'Bismillah', then when one remembers while eating, one should recite 'Bismillahi awwalahu wa aa-khirahu'".
narrator: Aisha radiyallahu 'Anha says:
body: "Messenger of Allah Sallallahli 'Alayi Wasallam said: 'When one eats and has forgotten to recite 'Bismillah', then when one remembers while eating, one should recite 'Bismillahi awwalahu wa aa-khirahu'".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ مُوسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو دَاوُدَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا هِشَامٌ الدَّسْتُوائِيُّ، عَنْ بُدَيْلٍ الْعُقَيْلِيُّ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ عُمَيْرٍ، عَنْ أُمِّ كُلْثُومٍ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ، قَالَتْ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: إِذَا أَكَلَ أَحَدُكُمْ، فَنَسِيَ أَنْ يَذْكُرَ اللَّهَ تَعَالَى عَلَى طَعَامِهِ، فَلْيَقُلْ: بِسْمِ اللهِ أَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ.
references: Book of The Words That Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Said Before and After Eating, Hadith 180

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 181
englishRaw:
Umar bin Abi Salamah (may Allah be pleased with him) 'Anbu came to Rasululah ﷺ while food had been served to him. Messenger of Allah Saliallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam said:
                      "O my Son come near, recite Bismillah, and eat with your right hand from that portion which is in front of you".
narrator: Umar bin Abi Salamah (may Allah be pleased with him) 'Anbu came to Rasululah ﷺ while food had been served to him. Messenger of Allah Saliallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam said:
body: "O my Son come near, recite Bismillah, and eat with your right hand from that portion which is in front of you".
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ الصَّبَّاحِ الْهَاشِمِيُّ الْبَصْرِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الأَعْلَى، عَنْ مَعْمَرٍ، عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ عُمَرَ بْنِ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ، أَنَّهُ دَخَلَ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، وَعِنْدَهُ طَعَامٌ، فَقَالَ: ادْنُ يَا بُنَيَّ، فَسَمِّ اللَّهَ تَعَالَى، وَكُلْ بِيَمِينِكَ، وَكُلْ مِمَّا يَلِيكَ.
references: Book of The Words That Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Said Before and After Eating, Hadith 181

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 182
englishRaw:
Abu Sa'eed Khudari (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
                      "After eating Messenger of Allah ﷺ read this du'aa:
Alhamdulillaahil-ladhi at-amanaa wa-saqaa-naa wa-ja-a-lanaa muslimeen.
narrator: Abu Sa'eed Khudari (may Allah be pleased with him) says:
body:
"After eating Messenger of Allah ﷺ read this du'aa:
Alhamdulillaahil-ladhi at-amanaa wa-saqaa-naa wa-ja-a-lanaa muslimeen.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أَحْمَدَ الزُّبَيْرِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ الثَّوْرِيُّ، عَنْ أَبِي هَاشِمٍ، عَنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ رِيَاحٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ رِيَاحِ بْنِ عَبِيدَةَ، عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيِّ، قَالَ: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ إِذَا فَرَغَ مِنْ طَعَامِهِ، قَالَ: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَجَعَلَنَا مُسْلِمِينَ.
references: Book of The Words That Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Said Before and After Eating, Hadith 182

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 183
englishRaw:
Abu Umaamah (may Allah be pleased with him)-'Anhu says:
                      "When the dastarkhaan (table cloth) was being removed in the presence of Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam, Messenger of Allah Saliallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam recited this du'aa:
Alhamdulillaahi hamdan kathiran tayyiban mubaarakan fihi-ghayra mu-wadda-in wa-laa mus-taghnan 'anhu rabbuna.
narrator: Abu Umaamah (may Allah be pleased with him)-'Anhu says:
body:
"When the dastarkhaan (table cloth) was being removed in the presence of Messenger of Allah Sallailahu 'Alayhi Wasallam, Messenger of Allah Saliallahu 'Alayhi Wasallam recited this du'aa:
Alhamdulillaahi hamdan kathiran tayyiban mubaarakan fihi-ghayra mu-wadda-in wa-laa mus-taghnan 'anhu rabbuna.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا ثَوْرُ بْنُ يَزِيدَ، عَنْ خَالِدُ بْنُ مَعْدَانَ، عَنْ أَبِي أُمَامَةَ، قَالَ: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ إِذَا رُفِعَتِ الْمَائِدَةُ مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ، يَقُولُ: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ حَمْدًا كَثِيرًا طَيِّبًا مُبَارَكًا فِيهِ، غَيْرَ مُودَعٍ، وَلا مُسْتَغْنًى عَنْهُ رَبَّنَا.
references: Book of The Words That Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Said Before and After Eating, Hadith 183

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 184
englishRaw:
Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) relates that while Messenger of Allah Saliallahu aIayhi Wasallam and six of the Sahaabah were having meals, a badawi came. He ate all the food up in two bites. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said:
                      "If he had read 'Bismillah' it should have been sufficient for all."
narrator: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) relates that while Messenger of Allah Saliallahu aIayhi Wasallam and six of the Sahaabah were having meals, a badawi came. He ate all the food up in two bites. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said:
body: "If he had read 'Bismillah' it should have been sufficient for all."
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبَانَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ هِشَامٍ الدَّسْتُوائِيِّ، عَنْ بُدَيْلِ بْنِ مَيْسَرَةَ الْعُقَيْلِيِّ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ عُمَيْرٍ، عَنْ أُمِّ كُلْثُومٍ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ، قَالَتْ: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ يَأْكُلُ الطَّعَامَ فِي سِتَّةٍ مِنْ أَصْحَابِهِ، فَجَاءَ أَعْرَابِيٌّ، فَأَكَلَهُ بِلُقْمَتَيْنِ، فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: لَوْ سَمَّى لَكَفَاكُمْ.
references: Book of The Words That Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Said Before and After Eating, Hadith 184

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 185
englishRaw: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) relates from Messenger of Allah ﷺ that, Allah Ta'aala is pleased with that servant who eats one morsel (bite) or drinks one sip and gives thanks to Him.
body: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) relates from Messenger of Allah ﷺ that, Allah Ta'aala is pleased with that servant who eats one morsel (bite) or drinks one sip and gives thanks to Him.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا هَنَّادٌ، وَمَحْمُودُ بْنُ غَيْلانَ، قَالا: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ، عَنْ زَكَرِيَّا بْنِ أَبِي زَائِدَةَ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَيَرْضَى عَنِ الْعَبْدِ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ الأَكْلَةَ، أَوْ يَشْرَبَ الشَّرْبَةَ فَيَحْمَدَهُ عَلَيْهَا.
references: Book of The Words That Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ Said Before and After Eating, Hadith 185

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 186
englishRaw: Thaabit (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) showed us a large wooden cup, which was lined with metal, and said, O Thaabit, this is the cup of Messenger of Allah ﷺ
body: Thaabit (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) showed us a large wooden cup, which was lined with metal, and said, O Thaabit, this is the cup of Messenger of Allah ﷺ
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ الأَسْوَدِ الْبَغْدَادِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ طَهْمَانَ، عَنْ ثَابِتٍ، قَالَ: أَخَرَجَ إِلَيْنَا أَنَسُ بْنُ مَالِكٍ، قَدَحَ خَشَبٍ، غَلِيظًا، مُضَبَّبًا بِحَدِيدٍ، فَقَالَ: يَا ثَابِتُ، هَذَا قَدَحُ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ.
references: Book of The Cup Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 186

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 187
englishRaw: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, I gave Messenger of Allah ﷺ to drink from this cup all those things which are drunk; Nabeedh, milk, etc.
body: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, I gave Messenger of Allah ﷺ to drink from this cup all those things which are drunk; Nabeedh, milk, etc.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ، قَالَ: أَنْبَأَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَاصِمٍ، قَالَ: أَنْبَأَنَا حَمَّادُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ، قَالَ: أَنْبَأَنَا حُمَيْدٌ، وَثَابِتٌ، عَنْ أَنَسٍ، قَالَ: لَقَدْ سَقَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، بِهَذَا الْقَدَحِ الشَّرَابَ كُلَّهُ، الْمَاءَ، وَالنَّبِيذَ، وَالْعَسَلَ، وَاللَّبَنَ.
references: Book of The Cup Of Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 187

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 188
englishRaw: Abdullah ibn Jaafar (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate Qith'thaa (cucumbers) with dates
body: Abdullah ibn Jaafar (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate Qith'thaa (cucumbers) with dates
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ مُوسَى الْفَزَارِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ سَعْدٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ، قَالَ: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ، يَأْكُلُ الْقِثَّاءَ بِالرُّطَبِ.
references: Book of The Fruits Eaten By Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 188

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 189
englishRaw: Aisha radiyallah anha reports that, Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate watermelon with fresh dates.
body: Aisha radiyallah anha reports that, Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate watermelon with fresh dates.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدَةُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ الْخُزَاعِيُّ الْبَصْرِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ هِشَامٍ، عَنْ سُفْيَانَ، عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، كَانَ يَأْكُلُ الْبِطِّيخَ بِالرُّطَبِ.
references: Book of The Fruits Eaten By Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 189

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 190
englishRaw: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ eat together musk-melon and dates.
body: Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, I saw Messenger of Allah ﷺ eat together musk-melon and dates.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ يَعْقُوبَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا وَهْبُ بْنُ جَرِيرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا أَبِي، قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ حُمَيْدًا، أَوْ قَالَ: حَدَّثَنِي حُمَيْدٌ، قَالَ وَهْبٌ: وَكَانَ صَدِيقًا لَهُ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، قَالَ: رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، يَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الْخِرْبِزِ وَالرُّطَبِ.
references: Book of The Fruits Eaten By Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 190

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 191
englishRaw: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate watermelon with fresh dates.
body: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ ate watermelon with fresh dates.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ الرَّمْلِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ بْنُ يَزِيدَ بْنِ الصَّلْتِ، عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ، عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ رُومَانَ، عَنْ عُرْوَةَ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ أَكَلَ الْبِطِّيخَ بِالرُّطَبِ.
references: Book of The Fruits Eaten By Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 191

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 192
englishRaw:
Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, When the people saw (picked their) new fruit, they used to come and present it to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Messenger of Allah ﷺ then recited this du'a:
                     Transliteration: Allahumma baarik lana fi thimaa-rina wa-baarik lanaa fi madinatinaa wa-baarik lanaa fi saa-'i-naa wa-fi muddinaa-Allahumma-inna Ebraahima 'ab-duka wa-kha-li-luka wa-nabiy-yuka wa-inna ab-duka wa-nabiy-yuka wa-in-nahu da'aa-ka li-makkata wa-inni ad'u-ka lil-madinati bi-mith-li maa da'aaka bihi li-makkata wa-mith-lahu ma'a-hu.Translation: O Allah! Bless us in our fruits. Bless us in our city. Bless us in our Saa', and bless us in our Mudd' (these are two measures used in Madinah to measure dates, etc.). O Allah verily Ibrahim alaihis salaam is Your servant, friend and Nabi (since it was an occasion for humbleness Sayyidina Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not mention here his being the habib - beloved - of Alah.) And (whatever) he has supplicated to You for (colonising) Makkah. (Which is mentioned in the aayah, ...so incline some hearts of men that they may yearn towards them, and provide Thou them with fruits in order that they may be thankful. - Surah Ibrahim, 37) I supplicate the same to You for Madinah."He then called a small child, to whom he gave that fruit.
narrator: Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, When the people saw (picked their) new fruit, they used to come and present it to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Messenger of Allah ﷺ then recited this du'a:
body: Transliteration: Allahumma baarik lana fi thimaa-rina wa-baarik lanaa fi madinatinaa wa-baarik lanaa fi saa-'i-naa wa-fi muddinaa-Allahumma-inna Ebraahima 'ab-duka wa-kha-li-luka wa-nabiy-yuka wa-inna ab-duka wa-nabiy-yuka wa-in-nahu da'aa-ka li-makkata wa-inni ad'u-ka lil-madinati bi-mith-li maa da'aaka bihi li-makkata wa-mith-lahu ma'a-hu.Translation: O Allah! Bless us in our fruits. Bless us in our city. Bless us in our Saa', and bless us in our Mudd' (these are two measures used in Madinah to measure dates, etc.). O Allah verily Ibrahim alaihis salaam is Your servant, friend and Nabi (since it was an occasion for humbleness Sayyidina Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not mention here his being the habib - beloved - of Alah.) And (whatever) he has supplicated to You for (colonising) Makkah. (Which is mentioned in the aayah, ...so incline some hearts of men that they may yearn towards them, and provide Thou them with fruits in order that they may be thankful. - Surah Ibrahim, 37) I supplicate the same to You for Madinah."He then called a small child, to whom he gave that fruit.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ أَنَسٍ (ح) وَحَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ مُوسَى، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَعْنٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مَالِكٌ، عَنْ سُهَيْلِ بْنِ أَبِي صَالِحٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، قَالَ: كَانَ النَّاسُ إِذَا رَأَوْا أَوَّلَ الثَّمَرِ جَاءُوا بِهِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، فَإِذَا أَخَذَهُ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، قَالَ: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِي ثِمَارِنَا، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي مَدِينَتِنَا، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي صَاعِنَا وَفِي مُدِّنَا، اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَبْدُكَ وَخَلِيلُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ، وَإِنِّي عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ، وَإِنَّهُ دَعَاكَ لِمَكَّةَ، وَإِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ لِلْمَدِينَةِ، بِمِثْلِ مَا دَعَاكَ بِهِ لِمَكَّةَ وَمِثْلِهِ مَعَهُ، قَالَ: ثُمَّ يَدْعُو أَصْغَرَ وَلِيدٍ يَرَاهُ، فَيُعْطِيهِ ذَلِكَ الثَّمَرَ.
references: Book of The Fruits Eaten By Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 192

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 193
englishRaw: Rubayyi bint Mu'awwidh ibn Afraa radiyallahu anha says, My uncle Mu'aadh ibn Afraa sent me with a plate of fresh dates, which had small cucumbers on it, to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Messenger of Allah ﷺ relished cucumbers. I took this to him. At that time some jewellery had been sent to Messenger of Allah ﷺ from Bahrain. He took a handful from it and gave it to me
body: Rubayyi bint Mu'awwidh ibn Afraa radiyallahu anha says, My uncle Mu'aadh ibn Afraa sent me with a plate of fresh dates, which had small cucumbers on it, to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Messenger of Allah ﷺ relished cucumbers. I took this to him. At that time some jewellery had been sent to Messenger of Allah ﷺ from Bahrain. He took a handful from it and gave it to me
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حُمَيْدٍ الرَّازِيُّ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْمُخْتَارِ، عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ، عَنْ أَبِي عُبَيْدَةَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَمَّارِ بْنِ يَاسِرٍ، عَنِ الرُّبَيِّعِ بِنْتِ مُعَوِّذِ بْنِ عَفْرَاءَ، قَالَتْ: بَعَثَنِي مُعَاذُ بْنُ عَفْرَاءَ بِقِنَاعٍ مِنْ رُطَبٍ وَعَلَيْهِ أَجْرٌ مِنْ قِثَّاءِ زُغْبٍ وَكَانَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ يُحِبُّ الْقِثَّاءَ، فَأَتَيْتُهُ بِهِ وَعِنْدَهُ حِلْيَةٌ قَدْ قَدِمَتْ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ، فَمَلأَ يَدَهُ مِنْهَا فَأَعْطَانِيهِ.
references: Book of The Fruits Eaten By Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 193

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 194
englishRaw: Rubayyi bint Mu'awwidh ibn Afraa radiyallahu anha said, I took a plate of fresh dates and small cucumbers to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He gave me a handful of jewellery, or a handful of gold
body: Rubayyi bint Mu'awwidh ibn Afraa radiyallahu anha said, I took a plate of fresh dates and small cucumbers to Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He gave me a handful of jewellery, or a handful of gold
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا شَرِيكٌ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَقِيلٍ، عَنِ الرُّبَيِّعِ بِنْتِ مُعَوِّذِ بْنِ عَفْرَاءَ، قَالَتْ: أَتيتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، بِقِنَاعٍ مِنْ رُطَبٍ، وَأَجْرِ زُغْبٍ، فَأَعْطَانِي مِلْءَ كَفِّهِ حُلِيًّا أَوْ قَالَتْ: ذَهَبًا.
references: Book of The Fruits Eaten By Prophet of Allah ﷺ, Hadith 194

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 195
englishRaw: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says, The drink most liked by Messenger of Allah ﷺ was that which was sweet and cold
body: Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) says, The drink most liked by Messenger of Allah ﷺ was that which was sweet and cold
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عُمَرَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنْ مَعْمَرٍ، عَنِ الزُّهْرِيِّ، عَنْ عُرْوَةَ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ، قَالَتْ: كَانَ أَحَبَّ الشَّرَابِ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، الْحُلْوُ الْبَارِدُ.
references: Book of Description Of The Things Prophet of Allah ﷺ Drank, Hadith 195

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 196
englishRaw:
Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, Khalid ibn Waleed and I both accompanied Messenger of Allah ﷺ to the house of Maymunah. (Ummul Mu'mineen, Maymunah radiyallahu anha was the maternal aunt of both). She served milk in a vessel. Messenger of Allah ﷺ drank from it. I was on his right and Khalid ibn Waleed on his left. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said the right of drinking is now yours (as you are on the right). If you so wish you could give your right to Khalid. I replied that I would give no one preference from your left over. After that Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, Whenever Allah feeds one something, this du'aa should be recited:
                     Allahumma baarik lanaa fihi wa-at'imanaa khayram minhu.(Translation: O Allah grant us barakah in it, and feed us something better than it.)Whenever Allah gives someone milk to drink one should read:Allahumma baarik lanaa fihi wa-zidnaa minhu.(Translation: O Allah grant us barakah in it and increase it for us.)Sayyidinaa Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) says that after having something Messenger of Allah ﷺ made du'aa for something better than it. And after drinking milk he taught to make du'aa for the increase of it, because Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, There is nothing that serves both as food and water excepting milk.
narrator: Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) reports, Khalid ibn Waleed and I both accompanied Messenger of Allah ﷺ to the house of Maymunah. (Ummul Mu'mineen, Maymunah radiyallahu anha was the maternal aunt of both). She served milk in a vessel. Messenger of Allah ﷺ drank from it. I was on his right and Khalid ibn Waleed on his left. Messenger of Allah ﷺ said the right of drinking is now yours (as you are on the right). If you so wish you could give your right to Khalid. I replied that I would give no one preference from your left over. After that Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, Whenever Allah feeds one something, this du'aa should be recited:
body: Allahumma baarik lanaa fihi wa-at'imanaa khayram minhu.(Translation: O Allah grant us barakah in it, and feed us something better than it.)Whenever Allah gives someone milk to drink one should read:Allahumma baarik lanaa fihi wa-zidnaa minhu.(Translation: O Allah grant us barakah in it and increase it for us.)Sayyidinaa Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) says that after having something Messenger of Allah ﷺ made du'aa for something better than it. And after drinking milk he taught to make du'aa for the increase of it, because Messenger of Allah ﷺ said, There is nothing that serves both as food and water excepting milk.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَنِيعٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ زَيْدٍ، عَنْ عُمَرَ هُوَ ابْنُ أَبِي حَرْمَلَةَ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ: دَخَلْتُ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللهِ ﷺ، أَنَا، وَخَالِدُ بْنُ الْوَلِيدِ عَلَى مَيْمُونَةَ، فَجَاءَتْنَا بِإِنَاءٍ مِنْ لَبَنٍ، فَشَرِبَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ، وَأَنَا عَلَى يَمِينِهِ، وَخَالِدٌ عَلَى شِمَالِهِ، فَقَالَ لِي: الشَّرْبَةُ لَكَ، فَإِنْ شِئِتَ آثَرْتَ بِهَا خَالِدًا، فَقُلْتُ: مَا كُنْتُ لأُوثِرَ عَلَى سُؤْرِكَ أَحدًا، ثُمَّ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: مَنْ أَطْعَمَهُ اللَّهُ طَعَامًا، فَلْيَقُلِ: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ، وَأَطْعِمْنَا خَيْرًا مِنْهُ، وَمَنْ سَقَاهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ لَبَنًا، فَلْيَقُلِ: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ، وَزِدْنَا مِنْهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: لَيْسَ شَيْءٌ يُجْزِئُ مَكَانَ الطَّعَامِ وَالشَّرَابِ، غَيْرُ اللَّبَنِ.
references: Book of Description Of The Things Prophet of Allah ﷺ Drank, Hadith 196

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 197
englishRaw: Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ drank Zam-zam water while he was standing
body: Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Messenger of Allah ﷺ drank Zam-zam water while he was standing
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مَنِيعٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عَاصِمٌ الأَحْوَلُ، وَمُغِيرَةُ، عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، شَرِبَ مِنْ زَمْزَمَ، وَهُوَ قَائِمٌ.
references: Book of Hadith Describing The Manner Prophet of Allah ﷺ Drank, Hadith 197

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 198
englishRaw: Amr ibn Shu'aib (may Allah be pleased with him) relates from his father, and he from his (Amr's) grandfather, that he said, I had seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ drinking water whilst standing and also whilst sitting.
body: Amr ibn Shu'aib (may Allah be pleased with him) relates from his father, and he from his (Amr's) grandfather, that he said, I had seen Messenger of Allah ﷺ drinking water whilst standing and also whilst sitting.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ، عَنْ حُسَيْنٍ الْمُعَلِّمِ، عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شُعَيْبٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنْ جَدِّهِ، قَالَ: رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، يَشْرَبُ قَائِمًا، وَقَاعِدًا.
references: Book of Hadith Describing The Manner Prophet of Allah ﷺ Drank, Hadith 198

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 199
englishRaw: Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, I gave Messenger of Allah ﷺ Zam-zam water to drink. He stood and drank it
body: Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, I gave Messenger of Allah ﷺ Zam-zam water to drink. He stood and drank it
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ حُجْرٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ الْمُبَارِكِ، عَنْ عَاصِمٍ الأَحْوَلِ، عَنِ الشَّعْبِيِّ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ، قَالَ: سَقَيْتُ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ، مِنْ زَمْزَمَ، فَشَرِبَ، وَهُوَ قَائِمٌ.
references: Book of Hadith Describing The Manner Prophet of Allah ﷺ Drank, Hadith 199

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 200
englishRaw: Nazzaal ibn Sabrah rahmatullahi alaihe says that while he was with Sayyidina Ali in the courtyard (of the Masjid at Kufah), water was brought in a clay pot to him. He took some water in his palms, washed his hands, gargled his mouth, put water in his nose (cleaned it), then made masah of his face, hands and head. Thereafter he stood and drank from it. Then said, This is the wudhu of a person who is in a state of wudhu. I had observed Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform (wudhu) in this manner.
body: Nazzaal ibn Sabrah rahmatullahi alaihe says that while he was with Sayyidina Ali in the courtyard (of the Masjid at Kufah), water was brought in a clay pot to him. He took some water in his palms, washed his hands, gargled his mouth, put water in his nose (cleaned it), then made masah of his face, hands and head. Thereafter he stood and drank from it. Then said, This is the wudhu of a person who is in a state of wudhu. I had observed Messenger of Allah ﷺ perform (wudhu) in this manner.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو كُرَيْبٍ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْعَلاءِ، وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ طَرِيفٍ الْكُوفِيُّ، قَالا: حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ الْفُضَيْلِ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ عَبْدِ الْمَلِكِ بْنِ مَيْسَرَةَ، عَنِ النَّزَّالِ بْنِ سَبْرَةَ، قَالَ: أَتَى عَلِيٌّ، بِكُوزٍ مِنْ مَاءٍ، وَهُوَ فِي الرَّحْبَةِ، فَأَخَذَ مِنْهُ كَفًّا، فَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ، وَمَضْمَضَ، وَاسْتَنْشَقَ، وَمَسَحَ وَجْهَهُ وَذِرَاعَيْهِ وَرَأْسَهُ، ثُمَّ شَرِبَ وَهُوَ قَائِمٌ، ثُمَّ قَالَ: هَذَا وُضُوءُ مَنْ لَمْ يُحْدِثْ، هَكَذَا رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللهِ ﷺ، فَعَلَ.
references: Book of Hadith Describing The Manner Prophet of Allah ﷺ Drank, Hadith 200

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 201
englishRaw: Sayyidina Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that Messenger of Allah ﷺ drank water in three breaths (i.e. in three gulps/sips) and used to say, It is more pleasing and satisfying in this manner
body: Sayyidina Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) relates that Messenger of Allah ﷺ drank water in three breaths (i.e. in three gulps/sips) and used to say, It is more pleasing and satisfying in this manner
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، وَيُوسُفُ بْنُ حَمَّادٍ، قَالا: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَارِثِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، عَنْ أَبِي عصَامَ، عَنْ أَنَسِ بْنِ مَالِكٍ، أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ: كَانَ يَتَنَفَّسُ فِي الإِنَاءِ ثَلاثًا إِذَا شَرِبَ، وَيَقُولُ: هُوَ أَمْرَأُ، وَأَرْوَى.
references: Book of Hadith Describing The Manner Prophet of Allah ﷺ Drank, Hadith 201

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 202
englishRaw: Sayyidina Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Whenever Messenger of Allah ﷺ drank water, he drank it in two breaths.
body: Sayyidina Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) says, Whenever Messenger of Allah ﷺ drank water, he drank it in two breaths.
arabic: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ خَشْرَمٍ، قَالَ: حَدَّثَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ، عَنْ رِشْدِينِ بْنِ كُرَيْبٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ: أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ إِذَا شَرِبَ، تَنَفَّسَ مَرَّتَيْنِ.
references: Book of Hadith Describing The Manner Prophet of Allah ﷺ Drank, Hadith 202

title: Shama'il al-Muhammadiya 203
